title: Product Software Quality (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Product Software Quality (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Create test plan and test case in detail, comprehensive and well structured.

Plan and Coordinate testing execution.

Create testing and bug fixing documentation.

Execute script testing and application testing.

Monitoring debugging process and bug fixing.

Doing investigation and provide solution on the issue and bug found during testing.

Tracking of the quality assurance metric e.g. open defect counts.

Experience working in a team with agile development environment.

Good communication skills in English.

Strong problem-solving.

Collaboration & Teamwork.

Able to work independently.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor’s degree, majoring in Computer Science, Information Technology or other related fields.

3-4 years of experience in software testing.

Experience in testing mobile, web, and API for both manual and automation.

Experience in Automation Testing Tools (e.g: Robotframework, Appium, Selenium).

Experience in Load Testing Tools (e.g: JMeter).

Experience in Penetration Testing Tools.

Experience in Behavior Driven Development & Tools (e.g: Cucumber with Gherkin).

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is a cutting-edge green digital agritech startup located in the heart of Jakarta. Our mission is to be the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the palm oil industry. Through our integrated end-to-end agri-platform, we create a win-win-win scenario for people, planet, and prosperity.

We provide integrated apps that connect the supply chain stakeholders in the palm oil industry (Mills, DO Agents, Smallholders, Harvesters, Drivers, etc.). Creating a digital ecosystem that essentially boosts their productivity with effortless work documentation, affordable yet original agri-inputs, and agronomist services.

Our commitment extends beyond providing innovative solutions; we aim to nurture every aspect of Indonesia's palm oil industry. By fostering growth and sustainability, we strive to bring positive change to the lives of individuals in the palm oil sector, one at a time.

Daftar Sekarang

title: Head of Product (Pekanbaru/Medan)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Head of Product (Pekanbaru/Medan)

Daftar Sekarang

Sumatra, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Primary Responsibilities

Own and drive product strategy from

zero-to-one

, ensuring alignment with long-term product vision and company strategy, and communicate it clearly to stakeholders and users.

Lead

experimentation-driven product development

, including rapid prototyping, MVP launches, A/B testing, and iterative validation.

Define, maintain, and execute product roadmaps, ensuring milestones are delivered on time with measurable impact.

Discover user pain points through qualitative research and deep data analysis; collaborate closely with analytics teams to translate insights into actionable product decisions.

Prototype product functionality and collaborate with design/UX teams to deliver best-in-class user experiences.

Develop go-to-market strategies and partner with growth teams to drive adoption, engagement, and retention.

Apply

growth-hacking principles

to product development, focusing on scalable acquisition, activation, and monetization levers.

Be highly analytical and data-driven; define success metrics and continuously measure product performance.

Lead, coach, and develop product managers, designers, and analysts, fostering a culture of experimentation, accountability, and continuous improvement.

Soft Skills

Proven experience working in agile development environments.

Strong communication skills in English, with the ability to influence senior stakeholders.

Exceptional problem-solving skills with structured and strategic thinking.

Strong collaboration and teamwork capabilities across cross-functional teams.

Ability to work independently in ambiguous, fast-moving environments.

Kualifikasi

Education

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Mathematics, Business, or other related fields.

Experience

8+ years of experience in Product Management, with demonstrated ownership of products from zero-to-one and scaling stages.

Strong track record in experimentation, growth initiatives, and data-led decision making.

Experience using Product Management tools (e.g. Trello, GitHub Issues, Google Drive).

Experience using Prototyping tools (e.g. Figma).

Familiarity with Data Analytics tools (e.g. Metabase, Google Analytics).

Experience in palm oil or agribusiness-related companies is preferred.

Nice to have: Background in top-tier management consulting and/or investment banking, with exposure to strategy, growth, due diligence, or complex business problem-solving.

Willing to be placed in Pekanbaru or Medan.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the Palm Oil Industry.

Our mission is to develop an integrated end-to-end agri-platform, creating a win-win-win for People, Planet and Prosperity. Our Vision is to help palm oil smallholders become more PROficient in farming practices, so that they can produce more FFB crop, resulting in greater PROsperity for indigenous communities, also creating PROfitability for our business, PROtection of the natural environment and PROgress of Indonesia

SawitPRO is a game-changer, improving the smallholders’ living standard and helping our planet to meet the growing global demand for sustainable palm oil through efficient land use.

title: Financial Analyst (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Financial Analyst (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

The Financial Analyst plays a key role in driving company performance through accurate budgeting, forecasting, and financial modeling. This position collaborates closely with cross-functional teams to gather data, analyze financial results, evaluate business initiatives, and provide insights that support strategic decision-making. The role also maintains financial models, dashboards, and reporting systems to ensure management has timely, reliable information for operational and strategic planning.

Develop annual budgets, long-term financial plans, and track performance against targets.

Prepare and enhance financial forecasts using historical data, market trends, and business inputs.

Conduct financial analyses to support strategic initiatives such as investments, mergers, and process improvements.

Monitor financial performance and KPIs to identify trends, risks, and improvement opportunities.

Generate regular and ad-hoc financial reports for management and stakeholders.

Maintain accurate financial models, databases, and dashboards for decision support.

Build scenario and sensitivity analyses to support forecasting and risk assessment.

Perform cost analysis to identify optimization opportunities and support finance automation initiatives.

Collaborate with multiple departments to gather information and validate financial data.

Present financial insights and recommendations clearly to senior management.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor's degree in finance, accounting, economics, or a related field from reputable university with minimum GPA 3.00.

Strong analytical and quantitative skills.

Proficiency in financial modelling and data analysis tools (e.g., Excel, financial planning software).

Excellent communication and presentation skills.

Attention to detail and accuracy.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Knowledge of financial principles, budgeting, and forecasting.

Willing to be placed in Pekanbaru area

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the Palm Oil Industry.

Our mission is to develop an integrated end-to-end agri-platform, creating a win-win-win for People, Planet and Prosperity. Our Vision is to help palm oil smallholders become more PROficient in farming practices, so that they can produce more FFB crop, resulting in greater PROsperity for indigenous communities, also creating PROfitability for our business, PROtection of the natural environment and PROgress of Indonesia

SawitPRO is a game-changer, improving the smallholders’ living standard and helping our planet to meet the growing global demand for sustainable palm oil through efficient land use.

title: Product Data Analyst (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Product Data Analyst (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Analyze user behavior and product performance metrics to provide actionable insights for product decisions and improvements.

Design and implement data tracking systems to measure key metrics across our platform.

Build and maintain clear dashboards to visualize KPIs for stakeholders.

Partner with product managers to identify opportunities and solve problems through data-driven approaches.

Run A/B tests to evaluate feature effectiveness and guide product iterations.

Create analytical models to predict user behavior and uncover growth opportunities within the palm oil supply chain.

Monitor and report on key business metrics focusing on smallholder productivity, supply chain efficiency, and sustainability outcomes.

Analyze agricultural data patterns to optimize product features for farmers and other stakeholders.

Provide business leaders with regular reports and custom analyses to inform strategic decisions.

Maintain clear documentation of data definitions, analysis methods, and insights to strengthen organizational knowledge.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Economics, or related field.

2+ years of experience in product analytics, business intelligence, or similar data-focused roles.

Strong SQL skills for complex data analysis.

Basic Python skills for data analysis and statistics.

Experience with data visualization tools (such as Tableau, PowerBI, or Looker).

Sharp analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities, with skill in turning data into actionable insights.

Understanding of statistical concepts and their practical applications.

Knowledge of product metrics and KPIs in digital platforms or marketplaces.

Strong verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to explain complex data insights clearly to non-technical audiences.

Experience in agritech, supply chain, or related industries is a plus.

Knowledge of Indonesian agriculture, especially palm oil, is beneficial but not required.

Willing to be placed in Pekanbaru, Riau.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the Palm Oil industry. SawitPRO develops an integrated end-to-end agri-platform, creating a win-win-win for people, planet and profit. Our missions are to improve the livelihood of Indonesia’s smallholders, to unlock value for the industry, and to strive in a demanding global market in traceability and sustainability of palm oil products.

We provide platforms that connect the supply chain stakeholders within the palm oil industry (i.e. Palm Oil Mills, Agents, Smallholders, and Agri Input vendors), create a digital ecosystem that removes friction points, and essentially boosts the productivity of the smallholders via access to affordable yet high quality agro-inputs, agronomic services, and high-quality planting materials.

We envision to be the game-changer that improves smallholders’ living standard, and helps our planet to meet the growing global demand for sustainable palm oil.

title: IT Support (Jakarta)
raw_description:
< Kembali

IT Support (Jakarta)

Daftar Sekarang

Jakarta, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Provide on-site technical support to our clients, identifying, diagnosing, and resolving issues.

Communicate effectively with clients to understand their needs and explain complex technical issues in an understandable manner.

Relay information and report issues to the engineering team at HQ, ensuring a smooth flow of information.

Coordinate with the engineering team to implement solutions and rectify problems.

Ensure customer satisfaction through proactive and reactive measures.

Provide training to customers on how to effectively use our products and services.

Stay updated on the latest products, services, and policies to provide accurate information to clients.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field, or equivalent practical experience.

Minimum 3 years of experience as an IT Support Engineer or similar customer-facing technical support role.

Strong technical troubleshooting skills with the ability to diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network-related issues.

Extensive knowledge of MikroTik RouterOS, including router configuration, firewall, VPN, bandwidth management, and network troubleshooting.

Able to design and set up office networks from scratch, including LAN/WAN infrastructure, routing, switching, wireless configuration, and internet connectivity.

Knowledgeable in configuring and managing wireless access points and networking devices such as Ubiquiti, Ruijie, and similar brands.

Extensive knowledge of Multi-Function Printers (MFP), including setup, troubleshooting, scanning, network printing, and maintenance.

Knowledgeable in CCTV systems, including installation, configuration, monitoring, and troubleshooting of IP camera systems and NVR/DVR devices.

Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills with a strong customer-centric attitude.

Ability to explain complex technical concepts and issues to non-technical users clearly and professionally.

Experience coordinating with internal engineering or technical teams to resolve escalated issues efficiently.

Willingness to travel to customer locations as required.

Willing to undertake a probation/training period in Pekanbaru.

Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and respond effectively under pressure.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the Palm Oil industry. SawitPRO develops an integrated end-to-end agri-platform, creating a win-win-win for people, planet and profit. Our missions are to improve the livelihood of Indonesia’s smallholders, to unlock value for the industry, and to strive in a demanding global market in traceability and sustainability of palm oil products.

We provide platforms that connect the supply chain stakeholders within the palm oil industry (i.e. Palm Oil Mills, Agents, Smallholders, and Agri Input vendors), create a digital ecosystem that removes friction points, and essentially boosts the productivity of the smallholders via access to affordable yet high quality agro-inputs, agronomic services, and high-quality planting materials.

We envision to be the game-changer that improves smallholders’ living standard, and helps our planet to meet the growing global demand for sustainable palm oil.

title: Procurement Fertilizer (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Procurement Fertilizer (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

The candidate’s responsibility will be to work closely with Head of Procurement, Head of Supply Chain, Sales & Finance team. You will be responsible for spearheading our procurement strategy, ensuring the acquisition of a diverse range of agricultural inputs at competitive prices (also including general procurement items required by the Company). Your expertise will be crucial in managing supplier relationships, negotiating contracts, and aligning our procurement efforts with the broader business objectives to support growth and operational efficiency.

You will be responsible to:

Develop, implement, and continuously refine a comprehensive procurement strategy that encompasses all categories of agricultural inputs.

Conduct extensive market research to identify reliable suppliers across different agri input categories, ensuring a diverse supplier base.

Lead the procurement process from supplier evaluation and selection to contract negotiation, ensuring adherence to quality, cost, and delivery standards.

Foster strong, strategic relationships with key suppliers to guarantee the best value in terms of price, quality, and service.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including finance, operations, and sales, to integrate procurement plans with business objectives.

Manage and optimize procurement budgets, focusing on cost-saving initiatives without compromising on product quality or availability.

Establish and maintain quality standards for all procured agri inputs, working closely with suppliers to ensure compliance.

Oversee logistics and supply chain management for all agri inputs, ensuring efficient and timely availability to meet customer demands.

Stay ahead of industry trends, market dynamics, and new technologies that can influence our product offerings and procurement strategies.

Kualifikasi

You will demonstrate the following requirements:

Bachelor's degree in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, Agriculture, or related fields.

At least 7 years of proven experience in procurement, preferably within the agriculture or e-commerce sectors, with a focus on a wide range of agri inputs. Experience in Palm Oil Industry is a great advantage.

Exceptional negotiation skills and the capacity to foster long-term supplier relationships.

Strong analytical, strategic, and problem-solving abilities.

Comprehensive knowledge of the agri input market in Indonesia and globally.

Fluent in English and Bahasa Indonesia, both written and spoken.

Proficient in the use of procurement software and advanced analytics tools.

Demonstrated leadership and team management capabilities, with exceptional communication and presentation skills.

Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively across diverse teams.

Ability to work under tight deadlines and handle multiple tasks simultaneously

Willing to Travel across Indonesia, and

permanent based in Pekanbaru City

.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the Palm Oil industry. SawitPRO develops an integrated end-to-end agri-platform, creating a win-win-win for people, planet and profit. Our missions are to improve the livelihood of Indonesia’s smallholders, to unlock value for the industry, and to strive in a demanding global market in traceability and sustainability of palm oil products.

We provide platforms that connect the supply chain stakeholders within the palm oil industry (i.e. Palm Oil Mills, Agents, Smallholders, and Agri Input vendors), create a digital ecosystem that removes friction points, and essentially boosts the productivity of the smallholders via access to affordable yet high quality agro-inputs, agronomic services, and high-quality planting materials.

We envision to be the game-changer that improves smallholders’ living standard, and helps our planet to meet the growing global demand for sustainable palm oil.

Daftar Sekarang

title: Business Intelligence Executive (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Business Intelligence Executive (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Contract (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Design and build automated internal applications (focusing on CRM and HRIS) utilizing Lark Base and workflow logic.

Maintain and troubleshoot the existing Lark ecosystem to ensure highly reliable and seamless daily operations.

Collaborate with stakeholders to map business processes and translate them into efficient Lark automations.

Write and optimize SQL queries to extract structured data from warehouses for robust analytical reporting.

Develop and manage executive-level KPI dashboards using BI platforms like Power BI, Looker Studio, or Metabase.

Conduct rigorous quality checks to guarantee uncompromising mathematical accuracy and flawless aggregations in all data outputs.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Information Systems, Computer Science, Business, or a related field.

Minimum 1 year of experience in Business Intelligence, Data Analytics, or a similar role.

Proficient in SQL and advanced Microsoft Excel.

Experience with BI and data visualization tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or Looker Studio.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to translate data into actionable business insights.

Good communication and stakeholder management skills.

Familiarity with data warehousing, ETL processes, or Python is a plus.

Able to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.

Willing to be placed in Pekanbaru, Riau.

Design and build automated internal applications (focusing on CRM and HRIS) utilizing Lark Base and workflow logic.

Maintain and troubleshoot the existing Lark ecosystem to ensure highly reliable and seamless daily operations.

Collaborate with stakeholders to map business processes and translate them into efficient Lark automations.

Write and optimize SQL queries to extract structured data from warehouses for robust analytical reporting.

Develop and manage executive-level KPI dashboards using BI platforms like Power BI, Looker Studio, or Metabase.

Conduct rigorous quality checks to guarantee uncompromising mathematical accuracy and flawless aggregations in all data outputs.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Information Systems, Computer Science, Business, or a related field.

Minimum 1 year of experience in Business Intelligence, Data Analytics, or a similar role.

Proficient in SQL and advanced Microsoft Excel.

Experience with BI and data visualization tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or Looker Studio.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to translate data into actionable business insights.

Good communication and stakeholder management skills.

Familiarity with data warehousing, ETL processes, or Python is a plus.

Able to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.

Willing to be placed in Pekanbaru, Riau.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the Palm Oil industry. SawitPRO develops an integrated end-to-end agri-platform, creating a win-win-win for people, planet and profit. Our missions are to improve the livelihood of Indonesia’s smallholders, to unlock value for the industry, and to strive in a demanding global market in traceability and sustainability of palm oil products.

We provide platforms that connect the supply chain stakeholders within the palm oil industry (i.e. Palm Oil Mills, Agents, Smallholders, and Agri Input vendors), create a digital ecosystem that removes friction points, and essentially boosts the productivity of the smallholders via access to affordable yet high quality agro-inputs, agronomic services, and high-quality planting materials.

We envision to be the game-changer that improves smallholders’ living standard, and helps our planet to meet the growing global demand for sustainable palm oil.

Daftar Sekarang

title: Videographer & Youtube (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Videographer & Youtube (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Contract (Full WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Plan, shoot, and edit videos for YouTube, social media, internal communications, and digital campaigns.

Handle end-to-end video production including pre-production, scripting support, shooting, editing, and publishing.

Create YouTube content such as podcasts, interviews, educational videos, customer stories, company updates, live sessions, webinars, tutorials, and event coverage.

Manage YouTube channel performance including thumbnails, titles, descriptions, tags, playlists, end screens, cards, and SEO optimization.

Monitor YouTube analytics including views, CTR, watch time, audience retention, subscriber growth, and engagement.

Create short-form video content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, and Facebook.

Develop content ideas and video concepts that can improve reach, engagement, and watch hours.

Support live streaming activities for podcasts, webinars, product launches, company events, and special campaigns.

Ensure all videos are aligned with SawitPRO brand identity, tone, and communication guidelines.

Work closely with the marketing, social media, SEO, product, and sales teams to support campaign objectives.

Handle video asset organization, storage, and content library management.

Create and maintain SOPs for YouTube content production, editing style, thumbnail design, publishing schedule, and video quality standards.

Stay updated with YouTube trends, content formats, editing techniques, audio trends, and platform algorithm changes.

Assist in managing basic equipment such as camera, lighting, microphone, tripod, and studio setup.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor’s degree in Multimedia, Broadcasting, Film, Communication, Visual Design, or related field.

Minimum 2 years of experience in videography, video editing, content production, or YouTube management.

Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, Final Cut Pro, or other video editing software.

Familiar with Adobe After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Canva is a plus.

Strong understanding of YouTube SEO, YouTube analytics, and audience growth strategies.

Able to operate camera, lighting, microphone, and video production equipment.

Strong storytelling, editing, and visual communication skills.

Good understanding of content trends across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn.

Able to work under tight deadlines and manage multiple projects at once.

Detail-oriented, creative, proactive, and open to feedback.

Experience in podcast production, live streaming, or webinar setup is a plus.

Experience in agriculture, startup, technology, or B2B industry is preferred.

Willing to be placed in Pekanbaru, Riau.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is a cutting-edge green digital agritech startup located in the heart of Jakarta. Our mission is to be the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the palm oil industry. Through our integrated end-to-end agri-platform, we create a win-win-win scenario for people, planet, and prosperity.

We provide integrated apps that connect the supply chain stakeholders in the palm oil industry (Mills, DO Agents, Smallholders, Harvesters, Drivers, etc.). Creating a digital ecosystem that essentially boosts their productivity with effortless work documentation, affordable yet original agri-inputs, and agronomist services.

Our commitment extends beyond providing innovative solutions; we aim to nurture every aspect of Indonesia's palm oil industry. By fostering growth and sustainability, we strive to bring positive change to the lives of individuals in the palm oil sector, one at a time.

Daftar Sekarang

title: Event Organizer (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Event Organizer (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Summary

:

The Event Marketing Coordinator plays a crucial role in the promotion and execution of events related to a digital loyalty platform specific to the Palm Oil Industry, with a focus on the Upstream and Midstream sectors. This role involves planning and coordinating various marketing activities, including trade shows, conferences, webinars, and industry networking events. The Event Marketing Coordinator works closely with cross-functional teams, industry partners, and stakeholders to ensure successful event experiences that drive engagement and enhance the platform's visibility in the market.

Responsibilities:

Event Planning and Execution: Plan, coordinate, and execute events aligned with the marketing strategy and objectives of the digital loyalty platform in the Palm Oil Industry. This includes identifying suitable events, managing event logistics, coordinating with vendors, and ensuring timely execution.

Event Marketing: Develop and implement event marketing campaigns to promote events and generate attendance. Utilize various channels, such as email marketing, social media, and industry publications, to maximize event visibility and attract target audiences.

Collateral and Content Development: Create event-related collateral, such as brochures, presentations, and promotional materials. Collaborate with the marketing team to develop compelling event content, including speaker profiles, session descriptions, and educational resources.

Industry Networking: Establish and maintain relationships with industry associations, organizations, and influencers. Actively participate in industry networking events and build strategic partnerships to expand the platform's reach and enhance its industry presence.

Event Analysis and Reporting: Measure and evaluate event performance through post-event analysis. Analyze metrics, such as attendance, lead generation, and attendee feedback, to assess event success and provide insights for future event planning and optimization.

Budget Management: Develop event budgets, track expenses, and ensure adherence to allocated budgets. Negotiate contracts and agreements with vendors, venues, and service providers to maximize cost-effectiveness.

Cross-functional Collaboration: Collaborate with the marketing team, sales team, product managers, and other stakeholders to ensure event strategies align with overall marketing and business goals. Coordinate with internal teams to secure speaker participation, organize product demonstrations, and provide event support.

Project Management: Effectively manage multiple event projects simultaneously, ensuring deadlines, deliverables, and budgets are met. Employ project management methodologies to streamline processes, enhance efficiency, and improve overall event experiences.

Kualifikasi

Requirements:

Education: Bachelor's degree in marketing, communications, business administration, or a related field. Relevant certifications in event management are a plus.

Experience: 3-5 years of experience in event planning, event marketing, or related roles. Experience in organizing and executing events within the Palm Oil Industry or a similar industry is highly desirable.

Industry Knowledge: Strong understanding of the Palm Oil Industry, specifically the Upstream and Midstream sectors. Familiarity with industry events, trade shows, conferences, and key stakeholders is preferred.

Event Management: Demonstrated experience in event planning, logistics management, and execution. Proven ability to handle multiple events simultaneously, work under pressure, and meet tight deadlines.

Marketing and Communication Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to create compelling event content and effectively communicate event details to diverse audiences. Proficiency in social media marketing and email marketing is desirable.

Relationship Building: Strong networking and relationship-building skills to engage with industry partners, vendors, and event participants. Ability to establish and maintain relationships with key stakeholders.

Analytical and Reporting Abilities: Proficiency in analyzing event data, generating reports, and extracting actionable insights. Strong attention to detail in tracking event metrics and measuring event success.

Budgeting and Financial Management: Experience in event budget development, expense tracking, and contract negotiation. Ability to manage budgets effectively and maximize cost-efficiency.

Creativity and Problem-Solving: Innovative thinking and problem-solving skills to overcome challenges, identify opportunities, and enhance event experiences. Ability to think strategically and deliver unique event concepts.

Flexibility and Adaptability: Willingness to work in a dynamic and fast-paced environment. Ability to adapt plans and strategies based on changing priorities and emerging industry trends.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the Palm Oil Industry.

Our mission is to develop an integrated end-to-end agri-platform, creating a win-win-win for People, Planet and Prosperity. Our Vision is to help palm oil smallholders become more PROficient in farming practices, so that they can produce more FFB crop, resulting in greater PROsperity for indigenous communities, also creating PROfitability for our business, PROtection of the natural environment and PROgress of Indonesia

SawitPRO is a game-changer, improving the smallholders’ living standard and helping our planet to meet the growing global demand for sustainable palm oil through efficient land use.

Daftar Sekarang

title: Fullstack Engineer Intern (Pekanbaru/Medan)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Fullstack Engineer Intern (Pekanbaru/Medan)

Daftar Sekarang

​

Tipe Pekerjaan

Internship (Full WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Responsibilities:

Participate in the complete development life cycle.

Develop backend services according to API specifications.

Develop internal tools

Integrate external / third party services.

Perform system analysis, design, testing, and documentation whenever necessary.

Write testing for unit and system integration.

Maintain code quality, unit testing, and automation.

Provide technical support on on-call rotations.

Kualifikasi

Educational background in Computer Science / IT, Engineering (Computer/Telecommunication), or equivalent.

Proficiency in Golang as primary language and other languages such as Java.

Proficiency in Git.

Proficiency in PostgreSQL.

Knowledge of RESTful APIs and microservices, experience designing & consuming them.

Experience in designing OpenAPI-based API.

Experience in working in cross-functional teams.

Have discipline in writing unit tests and integration tests.

Familiarity with development on cloud services such as GCP and/or AWS.

Familiarity with continuous integration and continuous deployment.

Familiarity with the Scrum development process.

Ready to be placed in Pekanbaru / Medan or willing to relocate there.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is a cutting-edge green digital agritech startup located in the heart of Jakarta. Our mission is to be the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the palm oil industry. Through our integrated end-to-end agri-platform, we create a win-win-win scenario for people, planet, and prosperity.

We provide integrated apps that connect the supply chain stakeholders in the palm oil industry (Mills, DO Agents, Smallholders, Harvesters, Drivers, etc.). Creating a digital ecosystem that essentially boosts their productivity with effortless work documentation, affordable yet original agri-inputs, and agronomist services.

Our commitment extends beyond providing innovative solutions; we aim to nurture every aspect of Indonesia's palm oil industry. By fostering growth and sustainability, we strive to bring positive change to the lives of individuals in the palm oil sector, one at a time.

title: Odoo Specialist Software Engineer (Jakarta)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Odoo Specialist Software Engineer (Jakarta)

Daftar Sekarang

Jakarta, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Contract (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Lead and participate in various development projects for our products and services and be involved in all development-related aspects of our technical operations.

Architect and design application solutions for complex business requirements within the agricultural supply chain domain.

Develop and customise Python-based ERP solutions according to specifications, focusing on backend services, APIs, and data processing systems using any popular Python framework (Odoo preferred).

Integrate applications with server components and third-party services, including ERP systems and internal agricultural data platforms.

Perform system analysis, design, testing and documentation whenever necessary to ensure code quality and maintainability.

Implement unit testing and system integration following best practices in software development.

Maintain and enhance existing applications while solving complex performance and architectural challenges.

Provide technical support on on-call rotations and troubleshoot production issues.

Take initiatives for required changes in software development processes to manage overall quality and efficiency.

Kualifikasi

Possess at least a Bachelor's Degree, or Master's Degree in Computer Science / IT, Engineering (Computer/Telecommunication), or equivalent.

Possess at least 2 years working experience in Odoo development and deployment.

Strong knowledge of Python and programming concepts with proven expertise in developing scalable applications.

Complete understanding of Odoo framework and its basic flow, including:

Proven expertise in developing custom modules in Odoo

Deep knowledge of Odoo data models and ORM (Object-Relational Mapping)

Experience with latest versions of Odoo (v14, v15, v16+) and excellent debugging skills

Odoo techno-functional knowledge across core modules (Sales, Purchase, CRM, Accounts, Inventory, Fleet, HR, Payroll)

Odoo Integration and APIs:

Experience with Odoo External API and XML-RPC/JSON-RPC

Web services integration (REST and SOAP) with external systems

API development for third-party integrations

Experience in OpenAPI 3.0 is a plus

Experience working with Source Control (Git) and following best practices for version control and code collaboration.

Experience in working with Web services integration (REST and SOAP) and API's Response (JSON and XML). Experience in OpenAPI 3.0 is a plus.

Good discipline in writing unit tests and integration tests with testing frameworks like pytest.

Experience with cloud services such as GCP and/or AWS is a plus.

Knowledge of Linux operating systems and command-line tools.

Experience in Finance and Accounting.

Experience with data processing and analytics tools relevant to agricultural data management.

Willing to be on a 1-year contract.

Willing to undergo a 2-month onboarding period in Pekanbaru

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is a cutting-edge green digital agritech startup located in the heart of Jakarta. Our mission is to be the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the palm oil industry. Through our integrated end-to-end agri-platform, we create a win-win-win scenario for people, planet, and prosperity.

We provide integrated apps that connect the supply chain stakeholders in the palm oil industry (Mills, DO Agents, Smallholders, Harvesters, Drivers, etc.). Creating a digital ecosystem that essentially boosts their productivity with effortless work documentation, affordable yet original agri-inputs, and agronomist services.

Our commitment extends beyond providing innovative solutions; we aim to nurture every aspect of Indonesia's palm oil industry. By fostering growth and sustainability, we strive to bring positive change to the lives of individuals in the palm oil sector, one at a time.

Daftar Sekarang

title: [Talent Pool] Supply Chain Management (Kalimantan)
raw_description:
< Kembali

[Talent Pool] Supply Chain Management (Kalimantan)

Daftar Sekarang

Central Kalimantan, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (Full WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

SawitPRO is expanding its operation supply chain team into Kalimantan and is building a strong talent pipeline to support our future growth. We are looking for passionate and driven professionals with experience in Supply Chain to join our Talent Pool.

Open Position:

Warehouse Team (Supply Chain Coordinator, Warehouse Operator, etc.)

Logistic Team (Transport and Hub, First Last Mile, etc.)

General Responsibility:

Support end-to-end supply chain operations, including logistics, warehousing, inventory, and distribution.

Coordinate with internal teams and external partners to ensure the smooth flow of materials and operational activities.

Monitor inventory levels and ensure timely availability of materials and supplies.

Track inbound and outbound shipments to ensure on-time delivery and operational efficiency.

Analyze supply chain performance and identify opportunities for process improvements.

Prepare operational reports and maintain accurate supply chain documentation.

Ensure compliance with company policies, procedures, and safety standards.

Participate in continuous improvement initiatives to enhance supply chain efficiency and effectiveness.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor's degree (S1) in Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Industrial Engineering, Business Administration, Agribusiness, or a related field.

Experience in Supply Chain, Procurement, Logistics, Warehouse, Inventory Management, Distribution, or other related functions is preferred.

Strong understanding of supply chain principles and operational processes.

Good analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Proficient in Microsoft Office, particularly Microsoft Excel.

Experience with ERP systems (Odoo) or Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) is an advantage.

Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively in a team environment.

Willing to travel for business purposes when required.

Willing to be based in Kalimantan according to business needs.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is a cutting-edge green digital agritech startup located in the heart of Jakarta. Our mission is to be the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the palm oil industry. Through our integrated end-to-end agri-platform, we create a win-win-win scenario for people, planet, and prosperity.

We provide integrated apps that connect the supply chain stakeholders in the palm oil industry (Mills, DO Agents, Smallholders, Harvesters, Drivers, etc.). Creating a digital ecosystem that essentially boosts their productivity with effortless work documentation, affordable yet original agri-inputs, and agronomist services.

Our commitment extends beyond providing innovative solutions; we aim to nurture every aspect of Indonesia's palm oil industry. By fostering growth and sustainability, we strive to bring positive change to the lives of individuals in the palm oil sector, one at a time.

Daftar Sekarang

title: Senior TechOps & Release Automation Engineer
raw_description:
Senior TechOps & Release Automation Engineer

Team

Engineering

Location

Jakarta, Indonesia

Job Type

Full-time

The role at a glance

Skills you need

What we offer

Life at Grab

The role at a glance

Get to Know the Team

Our team operates at the intersection of partner experience, platform reliability, and release execution. We manage DevHome and the operational systems that support partner onboarding, access, documentation publishing, and partner-facing product releases across mobile and web surfaces.

This team focuses on more than feature development. A large part of our work is making sure critical platforms remain stable, secure, and operationally efficient. That means managing incidents, improving deployment safety, maintaining infrastructure, and building automation that removes manual work from daily operations.

As part of the team, you will work closely with various departments, including Engineering, QA, Release Train, PM, BD, Legal, and Operations. Your collaboration will focus on keeping launches moving and ensuring that partner-facing platforms are reliable at scale.

Get to Know the Role

As a Senior TechOps & Release Automation Engineer (G4), you will lead the operational health and release readiness of DevHome and related partner-facing platforms. This is a hybrid engineering role for someone who enjoys solving operational problems with code, improving reliability, and taking ownership across the full platform lifecycle.

You will help keep systems production-safe, supporting partner onboarding and access workflows, managing release execution for Android and iOS, and driving automation across operational processes. You will span application support, infrastructure maintenance, incident response, deployment safety, and internal tooling. You will report to the Tech Support Engineering Manager and onsite in the Jakarta office based.

The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

Manage end-to-end DevHome operations, partner onboarding support, and release execution from intake through post-release verification.

Manage Android and iOS release activities, including cutoffs, submissions, phased rollouts, cherry-picks, rollback readiness, and release tracking.

Resolve operational escalations related to partner access, login issues, onboarding blockers, scope or configuration requests, and documentation publishing flows.

Make safe production changes across Go services, React/Docusaurus surfaces, configurations, secrets, tokens, and developer documentation.

Maintain Terraform-managed AWS infrastructure, GitLab runners, CI/CD pipelines, and other reliability-critical operational tooling.

Investigate and respond to production incidents using Datadog, Kibana, and system-level troubleshooting to resolve performance, latency, and partner-helping issues.

Support infrastructure lifecycle work such as AMI rotation, EC2 and Docklet maintenance, backend scaling, and migration to MEKS.

Develop automation, scripts, and internal tools that reduce manual effort across release management, approvals, assessment, and partner operations.

Contribute to on-call readiness, RCA follow-ups, SOP improvements, and runbook maintenance.

Partner with cross-functional stakeholders and external partners to unblock launches and keep platform operations moving smoothly.

title: VP-Head of Homes Sumatra
raw_description:
The Head of Homes (Program Management & Growth) is responsible for spearheading the strategic expansion and operational excellence of the home broadband business (FTTH & FWA). This role focuses on driving sustainable subscriber growth, managing end-to-end program lifecycles, and optimizing the go-to-market execution to capture a leading share in the market.
By integrating rigorous program management with innovative growth strategies, this role ensures the seamless rollout of network coverage and the effective acquisition of new households. The Head of Homes leverages data-driven insights to identify high-potential areas, optimizes sales channel performance, and collaborates cross-functionally with sales and technical teams to accelerate penetration. Through a focus on agile execution and market responsiveness, this role plays a pivotal part in scaling the home business, enhancing brand presence, and delivering long-term revenue growth in the circle.

 

Workflow Key Responsibilities
Home Broadband Market Growth Develop and implement strategies to grow the home broadband customer base.
Loyalty & Retention Strategies Design and execute circle loyalty programs to enhance customer retention.
Go-to-Market (GTM) Execution Lead the planning and execution of go-to-market (GTM) strategies for Homes
Cross-Sell & Upsell Optimization Drive revenue growth by optimizing cross-sell and upsell initiatives.
Customer Segmentation & Personalization Use customer analytics to personalize offerings and improve engagement.
Revenue Planning & Performance Tracking Monitor revenue performance and align marketing efforts with business targets.
Cross-functional Collaboration Collaborate with HBB teams in HQ and Sales and technology teams for seamless execution.
Team Leadership & Development Build and mentor a high-performing marketing team with a focus on innovation and agility.

 

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) Summary

1. Home Broadband Customer & RevenueGrowth – Increase in high-value customer acquisitions as well as revenue
2. Retention Rate – Percentage of retained high-value customers.
3. Churn Rate Reduction – Decrease in HBB customer churn.
4. Average Revenue Per User (ARPU) – Growth in high-value customer spending.
5. Net Promoter Score (NPS) – Customer satisfaction and advocacy levels.

 

Qualifications

1. Experience in Home Broadband customer segment growth (FTTH & FWA) with at least 3 years experiences in leadership role
2. Strong background in FTTH & FWA marketing.
3. Ability to leverage data for customer segmentation and personalization.
4. Proven track record in cross-sell and upsell optimization.
5. Expertise in driving high-value customer engagement strategies.
6. Strong leadership and analytical skills.
7. Bachelor's or Master's degree in Business, Marketing, Engineering or related field.

title: Sr Officer- Platform Product Owner- New Technology & Innovation
raw_description:
Job Description

Key Responsibilities:

  • Manage Agile delivery processes, including sprint planning, backlog grooming, User Acceptance Testing (UAT), and post-test coordination.
  • Create and maintain technical documentation such as Product Requirements Documents (PRDs), user flows, and business process documentation to align stakeholders, engineering teams, and third-party vendors.
  • Translate business requirements into comprehensive product solutions, covering UI/UX aspects, API integrations, and third-party system integrations.
  • Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, including Sales, Finance, IT, Design, and Marketing, to ensure successful product execution.
  • Conduct research on platform features and competitor offerings to inform product strategy and data-driven decision-making.
  • Measure the impact of released product changes or features to ensure tangible results that align with business targets.

Requirements & Qualifications:

  • 3+ years of experience in product management or as a Product Owner, with a proven track record in the telecommunications (B2B/B2C), IT services, or digital payment solutions industry.
  • Strong technical expertise in Agile Project Management and proficiency with task management software such as JIRA.
  • Strategic thinking and sharp decision-making skills to prioritize the product backlog effectively.
  • Proven experience in leading cross-functional teams and managing stakeholder collaboration.
  • High adaptability in fast-paced environments with strong multitasking capabilities.
  • Educational background in Business Informatics, Informatics Engineering, or other relevant fields that provide a foundation in technical understanding and digital innovation.
  • Excellent communication skills in both Indonesian and English.

title: AVP-Head of Development - Sales Application
raw_description:
Role Purpose

The Development Lead - Sales Platform is responsible for leading the end-to-end design, development, and delivery of scalable, high-performing technology solutions that power the sales platform. This role ensures the platform meets business needs by translating requirements into robust technical architectures, overseeing agile development teams, and integrating digital capabilities that enhance the sales customer and partner experience. The AVP collaborates closely with product owners, architects, and cross-functional stakeholders to drive innovation, maintain code quality, and ensure timely delivery of platform features that support business growth and operational efficiency.

 

 

Job Description

Software Development & Delivery Leadership

  • Lead and manage agile development teams delivering retail platform features
  • Oversee the full software development lifecycle (planning, coding, testing, deployment)

Product & Business Alignment

  • Work closely with business users to understand feature requirements and business goals
  • Translate business needs into clear technical solutions and implementation plans
  • Prioritize technical deliverables to balance speed, quality, and value

Platform Modernization & Innovation

  • Drive modernization initiatives such as microservices, API-first design, and cloud-native solutions
  • Explore and incorporate emerging technologies (e.g., AI/ML, personalization, real-time analytics)
  • Promote continuous improvement through innovation and technical excellence

 

Qualification

  • Bachelor's degree in computer science, information technology or equivalent field.
  • Minimum 8 years of experience working in delivering digital solutions, especially on mobile and web-based applications.
  • Deep knowledge on system integration using common communication method such as SOAP and JSON
  • Knowledge and able to work with Agile Approach
  • Team player on project-based delivery
  • Have proven experience in delivering digital projects, consists of mobile and web-based application.
  • Understanding of security principles integrating single page apps, mobile apps, and third-party systems using OAuth2, SSO, JWT.
  • Understanding of Microservices architecture and patterns, micro gateway, docker, Kubernetes fundamental.
  • Experience in software development management lifecycle with Agile or Scrum.
  • Experience developing APIs to be consumed by mobile app and or external partners.
  • Experience Cassandra, MongoDB / MySQL / PostgreSQL, SQL Server, and Oracle DB.
  • Deep understanding on one of the programming language either Java, Go, Phyton, NodeJS, Android, Objective-C or Swift
  • Have a deep understanding of mobile application/ web development including API system integration, application/ web programming, database design, containerization and platform design
  • Solid understanding of API Products, Apps, Analytics.
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills and capabilities
  • Target oriented problem-solving approach and decision-making capabilities.
  • Certified in Agile Methodology, and Devops is preferable 

Experience:

  • Minimum 5 years' hands-on experiences solutioning, architecting and delivering mobile app and website products.
  • Product Development, Product management capability, especially on telecommunication industry
  • Preferably had various assignments in different functions in Marketing or having experience in working in highly dynamic companies
  • Deep understanding of the telecommunication and competitive landscape in Indonesia
  • Highly experienced in leading cross functional teams

 

Skills:

  • Agile leaner and responsive to feedback
  • Collaborative team player
  • Ability to plan holistically
  • Quality & Results Orientation
  • Proactive to ensure goals are met and we stay ahead of the competition

title: Sr Officer-PS Core Java
raw_description:
Role Purpose :

Define and formulate strategic direction for CORE operations to optimize network performance, efficiency, and overall gain. Lead programs and initiatives related to network enhancement, technological evolution, and the integration of programmatic and automated processes within operational activities—including data science, correlation analysis, and reporting. Possess the ability to consolidate and synthesize program outcomes into structured, executive-level presentation materials, including clearly defined success metrics.

Area Responsibility :

Area of Responsibilities

Key Activities

Deliverables

Strategic Planning
  • Define network strategy in CORE operations to maximize the network performance/gain and efficiency.
  • Lead program and initiative for network or new technology enhancement and evolution.
  • Lead the development of programmatic/automation in operations activities including the data scientist, correlation, & reports.

title: Officer-National Salesforce Management
raw_description:
Job Details

Role Purpose:

Capability Building focuses on enhancing employees' abilities, while Reward Management ensures that those enhanced abilities are recognized and compensated. Both are integral in creating a high-performance culture where employees are continually developing and feel motivated by both monetary and non-monetary rewards.

This role specifically requires a deep understanding of field sales operations at Indosat Ooredoo Hutchison (IOH), enabling the postholder to bridge the gap between on-ground realities and system/capability solutions that support the sales team.

 

Key Responsibilities:

 

Sales System Analysis & Improvement

  • Conduct in-depth analysis of existing systems used by the sales team in the field (e.g. retailer apps, sales force tools, reporting platforms)
  • Identify system gaps, pain points, and inefficiencies based on field experience and direct engagement with sales team users
  • Translate field findings into structured system improvement proposals and feature requirements
  • Collaborate with Digital/IT and system solution partners to prioritize and implement enhancements
  • Monitor adoption and effectiveness of system updates post-implementation

Sales Capability Building (L&D)

  • Design and develop training modules covering both system usage and sales competencies
  • Build Train the Trainer programs to cascade capability at scale across field teams
  • Develop Corporate Competencies through New Leadership Competency frameworks
  • Align L&D programs with actual field sales challenges and system workflows

Reward Management

  • Design programs that motivate the sales team to achieve highest potential
  • Develop a comprehensive reward system that attracts, motivates, and retains top talent
  • Leverage system data to ensure reward programs are tied to measurable field performance

 

Qualification:

  • Bachelor's degree in Telecommunications, Computer Science, Information Systems, or Programming
  • Analytical thinking and understanding of telco business & digitalization principles
  • Willing to work hard and collaborate effectively as a team
  • Target & result oriented, with good teamwork and passion for data discoveries
  • Self-driven and high achiever mentality to drive high-performing teams
  • Adaptability: able to handle current situations and adjust to new challenges
  • Learning Mindset: agile in adopting new methods & technology for improvement

 

Related Experience:

  • Minimum 2 years of direct Sales experience at IOH (field sales, channel sales, or distribution sales)
  • 2 years of experience in capability building and developing people
  • Experience in building programs, training/module materials derived from stakeholder requirements and business needs
  • Experience in system development and partnership management

 

Skills

  • Analytical and problem-solving skills related to retailer apps
  • Ability to design retailer app architecture and plan future development
  • Translate stakeholder requirements into system solutions
  • Understanding of IOH sales tools and systems used in field operations
  • AI operating skill to support daily working

title: Sr Officer-B2B & HBB Analytic & Insight
raw_description:
Job Description

The Sr Officer-B2B & HBB Analytic & Insight is responsible for transforming large-scale customer, network, service assurance, and operational data into actionable insights that improve customer experience, service quality, operational efficiency, and business performance.

This role work cross-functionally with Network, IT, Commercial, Customer Experience and Operations teams to develop analytical models, predictive insights, and data-driven recommendations leveraging Google Cloud Platform (GCP), AI/ML technologies, and advanced analytics solutions. The outcome will translating technical network insights into strategic improvement initiatives that enhance service quality, reduce customer issues, and strengthen IOH’s competitiveness in the B2B and home broadband market

Key Responsibilities 1

  1. Customer Experience Analytics
    • Analyze end-to-end customer journey and service experience across B2B and HBB segments.
    • Identify key drivers impacting customer satisfaction, churn, complaint volume, service degradation, and customer loyalty.
    • Develop customer segmentation and behavioral analysis to support targeted improvement initiatives.
    • Monitor and evaluate customer experience KPIs and service quality trends

 

  1. Predictive Modeling & AI/ML Development
    • Develop predictive and machine learning models for:
      • Customer churn prediction
      • Trouble ticket prediction
      • Service degradation detection
      • Network quality anomaly detection
      • Customer satisfaction prediction
      • Upsell and retention opportunities
    • Utilize Google AI/ML ecosystem including:
      • Vertex AI
      • BigQuery ML
      • AutoML
      • Gemini or others AI capabilities
    • Develop scalable AI-driven recommendation and prioritization engines to support proactive customer handling and operational improvement.
    • Continuously improve model performance, explainability, and operational usability

Key Responsibilities 2

3. Cloud Data Analytics & Engineering

    • Process and analyze large-scale structured and unstructured datasets from multiple sources including:
      • CRM
      • Network performance systems
      • Trouble ticket systems
      • NPS/CSAT surveys
      • Usage and traffic data
      • Service assurance platforms
    • Build and maintain scalable cloud-native data pipelines and analytical frameworks using Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
    • Utilize tools such as:
      • BigQuery
      • Cloud Storage
      • Dataflow
      • Looker / Looker Studio
      • Cloud Functions
    • Ensure data quality, consistency, governance, and security compliance.

 

4. Business Insight & Decision Support

    • Translate analytical findings into clear business recommendations and operational actions.
    • Support management presentations with insight-driven storytelling and quantitative evidence.
    • Develop executive dashboards and automated reporting for customer experience and service quality monitoring.

Key Responsibilities 3

5. Operational & Service Quality Improvement

    • Identify service quality gaps and operational inefficiencies through advanced analytics.
    • Support root cause analysis for customer complaints, network degradation, and service instability.
    • Develop proactive monitoring frameworks and early warning systems for customer experience risks.
    • Support continuous improvement initiatives and customer experience transformation programs.

 

6. Collaboration & Innovation

    • Work closely with Network, IT, Commercial, Customer Experience and Operations teams to operationalize data-driven initiatives.
    • Promote adoption of cloud analytics, AI/ML, and automation capabilities across the organization.
    • Explore innovative use cases leveraging Google ecosystem technologies and Generative AI solutions for customer experience enhancement.

 

7. Strategic Reporting & Executive Insights

    • Develop executive-level reporting on B2B & HBB customer experience performance and improvement opportunities.
    • Present insights and recommendations to senior leadership including VP, SVP and CTO organizations.
    • Provide strategic analysis on how B2B & HBB experience improvements contribute to:
      • customer satisfaction
      • reduction of service complaints and trouble tickets
      • potential area for development

Minimum Requirements

Education:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Telecommunications Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information System or related field.
  • Master’s Degree is advantage

 

Experience:

  • Minimum 3-5 years experience in Data Science, Machine Learning, Customer Analytic, Business Intelligence.
  • Experience working with Google Cloud Platform (GCP)-based analytics ecosystem is highly preferred.
  • Experience in telecommunications, ISP, broadband, or digital service industries is strongly preferred.
  • Experience handling large-scale customer and operational datasets is preferred

title: AVP-Product & Customer Insight
raw_description:
Job Description

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead the management of tracking studies to monitor brand health and key business category performance, ensuring methodologies remain aligned with evolving market dynamics.
  • Manage continuous research programs across strategic segments to comprehensively monitor product usage patterns, customer behavior and satisfaction levels.
  • Serve as a strategic partner for external research agencies, overseeing the end-to-end process from research design framework to output validation to ensure high-impact deliverables.
  • Design and direct ad-hoc studies to provide data-driven solutions for business challenges and long-term strategic initiatives.
  • Establish and drive agile internal quantitative research capabilities to generate rapid insights that support swift and informed decision-making.
  • Synthesize various primary and secondary data sources into comprehensive, accurate analyses that are highly relevant to business requirements.
  • Translate complex data into compelling business narratives that are simple, engaging, and actionable for stakeholders.

 

Required Skills

Hard Skills

  1. Advanced Research Methodology, deep expertise in various market research techniques (Quantitative & Qualitative), including Usage & Attitude (U&A), Pricing Studies, Brand Funnel Analysis, and Concept Testing.
  1. Agency Management, proven ability to manage vendor relationships, and audit data quality from research agencies.
  2. Analytical Tools, proficiency in data analysis software (e.g., SPSS, Advanced Excel) and data visualization platforms (Tableau, Power BI).
  3. Data Synthesis, the ability to merge internal behavioral data (CRM/Usage) with market research findings to produce 360-degree customer analysis.
  4. Product Knowledge, a strong understanding of product lifecycles and the telecommunications/digital industry landscape.

 

Soft Skills

  1. Strategic Business Storytelling, the ability to transform technical data and figures into strategic narratives.
  1. Strategic Influence, capable of building trust and influencing management-level decision-making through evidence-based insights.
  2. Agility & Problem Solving, high adaptability to rapidly changing business priorities and the ability to provide efficient research solutions.
  3. Attention to Detail, high precision in validating data integrity before it is used as a benchmark for business decisions.

 

Experience & Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Marketing, Telecommunication or Social Sciences with a strong analytical focus.
  • A minimum of 5 - 8 years of experience in Market Research or Customer Insight, with at least 3 - 5 years in a managerial role.
  • A proven track record of managing research projects and reputable global research agencies.

title: AVP-Security Product Manager Lead
raw_description:
Company & Role Overview

Company Overview:

We are a leading technology company seeking a talented and driven individual to join our innovative team. Our mission is to deliver cutting-edge solutions that redefine industry standards and drive digital transformation. We foster a collaborative and dynamic work environment where creativity and strategic thinking are highly valued.

Purpose of the Job:

This role is responsible for the complete lifecycle management of designated products, ensuring alignment with the organization's strategic goals. The main purpose of this position is to drive product success through market analysis, innovation, and effective cross-functional collaboration. Key areas of focus include identifying market opportunities, defining product features and functionalities, and overseeing the product development process. Furthermore, this role involves creating product documentation and providing essential support to sales and marketing teams. Ultimately, the Product Manager leverages market feedback to continuously evaluate and refine product direction, ensuring optimal performance and market relevance.

Key Responsibilities

  • Product Vision & Strategy: Own and execute the strategic product roadmap for the enterprise cybersecurity portfolio, ensuring full alignment with the Security Product Factory's revenue targets and commercial objectives.

  • Go-to-Market (GTM) & Commercialization: Formulate and execute comprehensive GTM strategies—including pricing, commercial packaging, value positioning, and sales enablement—across direct enterprise channels and strategic partner networks.

  • Strategic Alliance & Partner Management: Collaborate closely with strategic joint-venture partners, global technology vendors, and external consultants to co-develop, launch, and scale co-branded security services.

  • Requirements & Lifecycle Management: Translate market needs and threat landscapes into concrete product requirements. Manage the full product lifecycle from conceptualization and business case formulation to development, launch, optimization, and eventual phase-out.

  • Sales Enablement & Presales Support: Drive cross-functional collaboration with B2B Sales, Presales, and Marketing teams, delivering training, collateral, and technical-commercial tools to accelerate pipeline conversion.

  • Performance Monitoring & Intelligence: Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs), product margins, and customer adoption metrics. Use data-driven insights to steer iterative feature enhancements and identify portfolio expansion opportunities.

Required Skills & Qualifications

Required Skills & Qualifications

Education

  • Required: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Cybersecurity, Business Administration, or a related technical/business field.

  • Preferred: MBA or Master’s degree with a focus on Product Management, Technology Management, or Cybersecurity.

Experience

  • Core Experience: Minimum of 5–7 years of B2B Product Management experience, specifically within the cybersecurity, cloud services, or telecommunications sector.

  • Portfolio Management: Proven track record of managing complex enterprise security solutions (e.g., threat intelligence, endpoint protection, web security, cloud security, or managed detection and response).

  • GTM Track Record: Demonstrated success in developing, launching, and commercializing security products that have directly driven measurable B2B revenue growth.

  • Ecosystem Experience: Solid experience working in multi-partner GTM environments, channel-based sales models, or collaborative ventures.

  • Stakeholder Leadership: Expert at guiding cross-functional, multi-layered teams (including software engineers, security researchers, marketing, and enterprise sales forces) without direct authority.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Deep familiarity with the Indonesian enterprise/B2B security landscape and regulatory compliance environments (e.g., Kominfo, PDP law, ISO 27001).

  • Industry certifications such as CISSP, CISM, CISA, or formal product management certifications (e.g., Pragmatic Institute, NPDP).

Core Competency Map

Proficiency Level Core Competency Domain Focus Areas
Expert Product & GTM Strategy Strategic roadmap design, enterprise pricing models, GTM planning, and value proposition tailoring.
  Partnership & Alliance Management Coordinating commercial and technical integrations with major tech partners and joint ventures.
  Stakeholder Orchestration Bridging engineering, sales, marketing, and executive leadership.
Advanced Technical Portfolio Definition Translating threat intelligence, cloud, and web security concepts into viable enterprise products.
  Sales Enablement & Marketing Developing high-impact training, client-facing collateral, and pre-sales positioning tools.
Intermediate Data-Driven Analysis Product performance metrics, margin analysis, and market trend tracking.
  Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) Navigating initial feasibility phases to structured launch execution.
Basic Product & Security Testing Supervising technical proof-of-concept (PoC) frameworks and functional validations.

title: Management Service Business Analyst
organization_name: Indoagri - PT. Salim Ivomas Pratama Tbk.
location: Head Office - Sudirman Plaza Indofood Tower - Jakarta Selatan
raw_description:
• Develop and manage data pipelines to ensure data flows are automated, stable, and timely.
  • Integrate and build data flow processes from various sources (SAP, PPMS, TM1, Checkroll, etc.) to prepare data for analysis and use in dashboards.
  • Build and manage a data warehouse to support business analytics needs.
  • Performing ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes to produce clean and structured data.
  • Maintaining data quality, consistency, and security through validation and monitoring processes.
  • Collaborating with the Business Analyst and ICT teams in providing data for reporting and decision-making.
raw_requirements:
• Bachelor’s degree in IT, Information Systems, Data Science, or a related field.
  • 1–3 years of experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar role.
  • Strong SQL skills and solid understanding of database and data warehousing concepts.
  • Experience with OLAP systems such as Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, or Databricks.
  • Good understanding of ETL processes and data pipelines (experience with tools like Airflow is a plus).
  • Familiarity with data integration from enterprise systems (e.g., SAP or similar).
  • Strong analytical skills and good communication abilities.

title: Medco E & P Indonesia - Heavy Duty Equipment & Lifting Specialist (TPC)
raw_description:
Medco E & P Indonesia is looking for an experienced Heavy Duty Equipment & Lifting Specialist to join our team through a Third-Party Contract (TPC). In this role, you will contribute to Sakakemang PSC, an upstream oil and gas project located in South Sumatra and operated by MedcoEnergi. Currently in the development phase, the project is progressing toward First Gas/First Production, with start-up targeted for Q3 2027.


In this role, you will lead the planning, execution, and supervision of heavy lifting operations and heavy equipment activities, ensuring the highest standards of safety, technical excellence, and operational reliability throughout project execution.


Key Responsibilities

  • Lead and review lifting engineering plans for critical lifting activities, including heavy structures, pipelines, and processing modules.
  • Ensure lifting operations comply with company standards, international codes, and project requirements.
  • Oversee the integrity, certification, inspection, and maintenance of cranes, lifting equipment, and heavy machinery.
  • Serve as the technical authority for complex lifting operations, ensuring safe execution in both greenfield and brownfield environments.
  • Drive HSSE excellence by leading risk assessments, enforcing lifting safety requirements, and exercising Stop Work Authority when necessary.
  • Monitor contractor performance and verify the competency of lifting supervisors, riggers, and crane operators.
  • Promote a strong safety culture through technical audits, toolbox talks, and continuous improvement initiatives.
raw_requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, or a related technical discipline.
  • Minimum 10 years of experience in the oil & gas industry, including at least 7 years as a Lifting Specialist/Engineer on gas production facility projects.
  • Proven experience supporting onshore gas pipeline installation and heavy static equipment installation.
  • Certified Lifting/Rigging Engineer or Appointed Person from an internationally recognized organization (e.g., LEEA, LOLER, or OPITO). Indonesian Kemnaker/MIGAS certification is an advantage.
  • Proficient in lifting design and planning software, with strong knowledge of international lifting standards (e.g., ASME B30, ASME B31.8, API RP 2D).
  • Strong leadership, communication, analytical, and decision-making skills.


Disclaimer: The selected candidate will be engaged on a contract basis through a third-party company appointed by MedcoEnergi. This role supports MedcoEnergi's projects and business objectives, and is delivered in alignment with the Company's standards, governance, and operational requirements.

title: Medco E & P Indonesia - Lead Construction (TPC)
raw_description:
Medco E & P Indonesia is looking for an experienced Lead Construction to join our team through a Third-Party Contract (TPC). In this role, you will contribute to Sakakemang PSC, an upstream oil and gas project located in South Sumatra and operated by MedcoEnergi. Currently in the development phase, the project is progressing toward First Gas/First Production, with start-up targeted for Q3 2027.


In this role, you will lead and oversee construction execution across multidisciplinary projects, ensuring safe, high-quality, and efficient delivery in line with project schedules, budgets, and company standards.


Key Responsibilities

  • Lead and supervise construction activities covering civil, structural, mechanical, piping, electrical, and instrumentation works.
  • Ensure construction is executed safely, on schedule, within budget, and in compliance with project specifications and quality standards.
  • Champion HSSE excellence by promoting a strong safety culture and ensuring compliance with all site safety requirements.
  • Coordinate with project teams, EPC/EPCM contractors, subcontractors, vendors, and key stakeholders to support seamless project execution.
  • Monitor construction progress, identify risks or delay, and implement mitigation and recovery plans.
  • Ensure compliance with quality plans, inspections, testing requirements, and timely resolution of construction issues.
  • Support pre-commissioning, commissioning, start-up readiness, and project handover to Operations.
raw_requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Construction Engineering, or a related discipline.
  • Minimum 15 years of experience in upstream oil & gas projects, preferably representing the Owner/Client.
  • Experience leading construction activities on EPC/EPCM projects (onshore and/or offshore).
  • Proven experience managing large contractor workforces in complex construction environments.
  • Upper Intermediate (B2) English proficiency.

Technical Competencies

  • Strong knowledge of pipeline systems, process facilities, structural, mechanical, and piping construction.
  • Ability to interpret engineering drawings, P&IDs, and technical specifications.
  • Experience in constructability reviews, construction planning and sequencing.
  • Knowledge of Project Management and Contract Management principles.


Disclaimer: The selected candidate will be engaged on a contract basis through a third-party company appointed by MedcoEnergi. This role supports MedcoEnergi's projects and business objectives, and is delivered in alignment with the Company's standards, governance, and operational requirements.
