title: Genting Oil Kasuri Pte Ltd. - Internal Audit
raw_description:
1. Establishes short, medium, and long-term goals and objectives for the Internal Audit. Develops strategies, monitors progress, and ensures that these goals and objectives are met within the approved budget, on time, and in compliance with relevant policies and procedures.

2. Develops an adaptable annual audit plan that outlines the audit work schedule, staffing requirements, and budget for the upcoming fiscal year. Ensures the audit work schedule is based on the prioritization of the audit universe, using a risk-based methodology that takes into account risks and controls identified by management.

3. Manages the execution of the annual audit plan, which may include special tasks or projects requested by management.

4. Reviews audit reports for presentation to management and other relevant parties at the conclusion of each audit. These reports include audit findings, recommendations, and management action plans, as well as the auditee's explanations for any recommendations.

5. Continuously follows up on outstanding management action plans to address significant risks and rectify major deficiencies identified during the audit process.

6. Assists in investigating significant suspected or alleged fraudulent or unethical activities within the company and promptly informs management.
raw_requirements:
• 10-12 Years of Experience in Finance (Oil and Gas Industry) : • Bachelor’s Degree in Economics and Accounting
  • Experience in the oil and gas industry or a public accounting firm.
  • In-depth knowledge of regulatory and compliance requirements, especially within the oil & gas industry (Laws 22/2001, GR 27/2017, GR 79/2010, MoF decree/PMK 258 th 2011) and SKK Migas Regulation (i.e. PTK 007, PTK 018, PTK 027, PTK 039, etc.) is preferable.
  • Have an understanding on the cost recovery concept, COSO Internal Control Framework, and Anti Bribery Management System is an advantage.
  • Have experience in the Big 4 (Four) AUDIT FIRM is an advantage
  • Certified Internal Auditor (CIA), Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Certified Information Systems Auditor (CISA), or other relevant professional certifications is an advantage
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a keen eye for identifying areas of risk and process inefficiencies.
  • Proficiency in audit management software, ERP systems, and data analytics tools (e.g. SAP)

title: Campus Hiring SBY - Facility Maintenance & Docking Staff - PMP
raw_description:
1. Mengelola dan memastikan kesiapan fasilitas galangan serta infrastruktur docking untuk mendukung kegiatan perbaikan kapal dan operasi dry docking.
  2. Melaksanakan kegiatan preventive dan corrective maintenance terhadap sistem dock, termasuk docking block, sistem pompa, crane, utilitas, serta peralatan pendukung lainnya.
  3. Mengkoordinasikan aktivitas docking dan undocking kapal agar kapal dapat diposisikan secara aman dan tepat sesuai docking plan serta prosedur operasional galangan.
  4. Melakukan inspeksi dan monitoring rutin terhadap fasilitas galangan untuk mengidentifikasi potensi kerusakan serta memastikan fasilitas memenuhi standar keselamatan dan operasional. 
  5. Mendukung kelancaran proyek ship repair dengan memastikan ketersediaan layanan fasilitas seperti pasokan listrik, compressed air, sistem air, serta peralatan workshop. 
  6. Melakukan troubleshooting terhadap permasalahan teknis terkait operasi fasilitas, sistem mekanikal, dan peralatan dock guna meminimalkan downtime selama proses perbaikan kapal. 
  7. Memastikan seluruh aktivitas maintenance dan docking berjalan sesuai dengan regulasi HSE, kebijakan galangan, serta persyaratan klasifikasi kapal.
  8. Menyusun dokumentasi dan laporan terkait aktivitas perawatan fasilitas, performa peralatan, serta catatan operasional docking.
  9. Berkolaborasi dengan tim produksi, engineering, dan project untuk memastikan ketersediaan fasilitas sejalan dengan timeline proyek ship repair.
  10. Mendukung penerapan continuous improvement guna meningkatkan keandalan fasilitas, efisiensi docking, dan performa operasional galangan secara keseluruhan.
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan Minimal S1 dari jurusan: 
    a. Teknik Mesin 
    b. Teknik Elektro 
    c. Teknik Perkapalan / Teknik Kelautan 
    d. Teknik Industri atau bidang teknik lain yang relevan 
  2. Sertifikasi tambahan terkait maintenance, crane operation, atau docking system menjadi nilai tambah.
  3. Pengalaman Kerja Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman di bidang: 
    a. Facility Management di industri berat 
    b. Maintenance system (preventive & corrective) 
    c. Docking Operation di galangan kapal 
    d. Ship Repair atau Shipyard Operation 
    e. Pengalaman menangani dry dock atau floating dock menjadi keunggulan.
  4. Keahlian: Memahami sistem dan infrastruktur galangan kapal, termasuk: 
    a. Docking block arrangement 
    b. Sistem pompa dan ballast dock 
    c. Crane, lifting equipment, dan workshop tools 
    d. Utilitas galangan (listrik, air, compressed air) 
  5. Menguasai konsep maintenance, meliputi: 
    a. Preventive maintenance planning 
    b. Corrective maintenance execution 
    c. Equipment reliability dan downtime control 
    d. Memahami prosedur docking dan undocking kapal
    e. Docking plan implementation

title: Campus Hiring SBY - PDC Maritime Officer - PMP
raw_description:
1. Mengelola dan mengoordinasikan program pengembangan kompetensi karyawan melalui Patria Development Center sebagai bagian dari strategi peningkatan kapabilitas organisasi. 
  2. Menyusun, mengimplementasikan, serta memonitor learning roadmap dan training plan sesuai kebutuhan bisnis dan arah strategis perusahaan. 
  3. Mengidentifikasi kebutuhan pelatihan (Training Needs Analysis/TNA) berdasarkan gap kompetensi, hasil performance review, serta masukan dari line management. 
  4. Mengembangkan dan mengelola berbagai program pembelajaran, seperti:
    a. Technical Training 
    b. Leadership Development Program 
    c. Culture & Values Internalization 
    d. Onboarding & Induction Program 
  5. Mengelola proses end to end pelaksanaan training, termasuk koordinasi peserta, trainer, vendor, jadwal, fasilitas, serta evaluasi efektivitas pelatihan. 
  6. Melakukan evaluasi dan continuous improvement terhadap program Patria Development Center untuk meningkatkan kualitas learning experience
raw_requirements:
Pendidikan Minimal D3 di bidang: 

  1. Teknik Perkapalan / Naval Architecture 
  2. Teknik Kelautan / Marine Engineering 
  3. Teknik Mesin / Elektro (dengan exposure industri maritim)
  4. Manajemen SDM / Psikologi (dengan pengalaman L&D di industri maritim)
  5. Pendidikan lanjutan atau sertifikasi di bidang Learning & Development menjadi nilai tambah.

Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman di bidang: 

  1. Training & Development / Corporate University 
  2. Human Capital Development khusus industri Shipbuilding atau Ship Repair Operations (exposure teknikal)

title: Technical Lead - GSI
raw_description:
• Menentukan arsitektur sistem dan mengambil keputusan teknis utama dalam pengembangan aplikasi
  • Mengarahkan desain UI/UX serta memastikan konsistensi desain sistem
  • Memastikan kualitas kode melalui code review dan penerapan best practices
  • Mengelola performa, keamanan, dan skalabilitas aplikasi
  • Mengatur pembagian tugas serta memonitor progres kerja tim engineering
  • Berkoordinasi dengan tim Product, Design, dan QA untuk memastikan keselarasan pengembangan
  • Memberikan mentorship dan arahan teknis kepada anggota tim
  • Mengidentifikasi risiko teknis dan memberikan solusi yang tepat
raw_requirements:
• Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang IT atau terkait
  • Pengalaman minimal 3 tahun sebagai Software Engineer / Technical Lead
  • Menguasai backend framework seperti Laravel, Golang, atau Django
  • Berpengalaman dalam frontend modern seperti React atau Vue
  • Memahami database relasional (MySQL / PostgreSQL)
  • Pengalaman dengan message broker (Redis, RabbitMQ) menjadi nilai tambah
  • Memahami optimasi performa aplikasi (caching, query optimization)
  • Familiar dengan containerization (Docker) dan deployment environment
  • Memahami konsep RESTful API, microservices architecture, dan integrasi antar sistem
  • Berpengalaman dalam pengembangan mobile apps (Flutter / React Native) menjadi nilai tambah
  • Memiliki pemahaman dasar hingga menengah di bidang AI / Machine Learning (nilai tambah)
  • Memahami konsep AI pipeline & data processing sederhana (nilai tambah)
  • Memiliki kemampuan leadership, komunikasi, dan problem solving yang baik

title: Customer Relationship Management Analyst - DSO
raw_description:
• Melakukan monitoring dan analisis data pelanggan terkait aktivitas layanan purna jual.
  • Menganalisis customer satisfaction, customer feedback, dan performa layanan service.
  • Mengelola serta mengevaluasi program CRM untuk meningkatkan customer retention dan loyalty.
  • Menyusun laporan, dashboard, dan insight terkait performa layanan after sales.
  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim Service, Spare Part, dan Customer Care untuk meningkatkan customer experience.
raw_requirements:
• Pendidikan minimal S1 Teknik Industri, Manajemen, Sistem Informasi atau jurusan lain yang relevan.
  • Menguasai Microsoft Excel dan pengolahan data.
  • Memiliki kemampuan analisis, problem solving, dan reporting yang baik.
  • Memiliki komunikasi yang baik dan teliti.

title: Account Receivable - HRT
organization_name: PT Jakarta Pakar Kardia (Heartology Cardiovascular Hospital)
raw_description:
1. Menyiapkan, memeriksa, dan melakukan rekonsiliasi tagihan, invoice, serta dokumen pendukung lainnya.

2. Melakukan tindak lanjut (follow-up) atas tagihan yang belum terbayarkan kepada perusahaan, asuransi, maupun pihak penjamin lainnya.

3. Berkoordinasi dengan unit terkait untuk menyelesaikan permasalahan administrasi, klaim, atau perbedaan tagihan.

4. Melakukan rekonsiliasi saldo piutang dan mengidentifikasi serta menindaklanjuti selisih atau ketidaksesuaian data.

5. Menjaga kelengkapan, akurasi, dan kerapihan dokumentasi yang berkaitan dengan proses penagihan dan penerimaan pembayaran.

6. Berpartisipasi dalam upaya perbaikan proses kerja untuk meningkatkan efektivitas pengelolaan piutang rumah sakit.
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 Akuntansi

2. Memiliki pengalaman di bidang Account Receivable, lebih disukai di rumah sakit

3. Memahami proses penagihan, rekonsiliasi, dan pengelolaan piutang

4. Mampu mengoperasikan Microsoft Excel dan sistem informasi rumah sakit (SIMRS)

5. Memiliki kemampuan analisis, komunikasi, dan negosiasi yang baik.

title: TAF - IT Business Process Analyst

• Bertanggung jawab untuk mengembangkan dan memelihara IT Quality Assurance untuk semua sistem yang berhubungan dengan IT termasuk pengembangan sistem, operasi, IT Architecture & IT Governance.
  • Bertanggung jawab untuk mendukung dan memantau setiap proyek IT agar berjalan dengan baik sesuai dengan kebutuhan bisnis dan prosedur.
  • Menganalisa dan memantau timeline project, berkoordinasi dengan anggota tim, menganalisa masalah yang ditemukan dalam operasional sehari-hari dan memberikan solusi.

  • Memiliki kemampuan belajar yang tinggi, kemampuan analitis yang baik, mampu bekerja dalam tim, serta berorientasi pada pencapaian.
  • Bersedia ditempatkan di Jakarta.

title: Marketing Staff - GSI
raw_description:
• Melakukan riset dan analisis pasar untuk mengidentifikasi tren, kebutuhan pelanggan, dan peluang bisnis baru.
  • Melakukan feasibility study terhadap ide, produk, atau layanan baru yang akan dikembangkan perusahaan.
  • Mengidentifikasi dan mengembangkan peluang bisnis yang dapat diimplementasikan menjadi produk, layanan, atau model bisnis baru.
  • Menyusun business proposal, business case, dan cost structure sebagai dasar pengambilan keputusan bisnis.
  • Mengumpulkan, mengolah, dan menganalisis data untuk mendukung pengembangan strategi bisnis.
  • Berkolaborasi dengan berbagai departemen dalam pengembangan produk dan implementasi proyek bisnis. 
  • Membantu pelaksanaan aktivitas promosi dan kampanye digital untuk mendukung pencapaian target bisnis. 
  • Membuat laporan dan presentasi terkait hasil riset, analisis, serta perkembangan proyek yang sedang berjalan.
raw_requirements:
• Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 Teknik Industri, Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, atau jurusan terkait.
  • Fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar, pengalaman 0 - 1 tahun di bidang Business Development, Marketing, Business Analyst, Product Development, atau bidang terkait menjadi nilai tambah.
  • Menguasai Microsoft Office, terutama Excel dan PowerPoint.
  • Memiliki kemampuan analisis data dan problem solving yang baik.
  • Memahami dasar-dasar market research, business development, dan feasibility study.
  • Mampu mengolah data menjadi insight dan rekomendasi bisnis yang dapat ditindaklanjuti.
  • Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi, presentasi, dan interpersonal yang baik.
  • Proaktif, memiliki inisiatif tinggi, serta mampu bekerja secara individu maupun dalam tim.
  • Memiliki ketertarikan pada pengembangan bisnis, strategi pemasaran, dan inovasi produk.

title: Otopprentice Engineering / Intern - AOP
raw_description:
Product Development Intern (Mechanical - Jakarta Utara)

  1. Melakukan uji coba pemasangan (fitting test) untuk produk otomotif.
  2. Melengkapi dan mengelola deskripsi serta dokumentasi produk perdagangan (trading products).
  3. Mendukung tugas-tugas administratif yang berkaitan dengan aktivitas pengembangan produk.


Assembly Engineer Intern (Mechanical - Jakarta Utara)

  1. Mendukung penjadwalan pemulihan (recovery) dan proses uji coba untuk mesin press fit baru.
  2. Membantu uji coba pengaturan parameter mesin untuk keperluan relokasi pabrik ke Karawang.
  3. Mendukung proses instalasi, uji coba, dan pengaturan parameter pada mesin baru.
  4. Menyusun laporan perkembangan (progress report) dan mendukung pengembangan lini perakitan (assembling line) baru.


Friction Engineer Intern (Mechanical - Karawang)

  1. Mendukung aktivitas pemulihan (recovery) dan perbaikan (troubleshooting) pada mesin bull brake.
  2. Membantu uji coba pengaturan parameter mesin untuk keperluan relokasi pabrik ke Karawang.
  3. Mendukung proses instalasi, uji coba, dan pengaturan parameter pada mesin baru.
  4. Menyusun laporan perkembangan (progress report) terkait aktivitas relokasi pabrik ke Karawang.


Process Design Engineer Intern (Industrial - Purwakarta)

  1. Merancang proses produksi dari awal hingga akhir (end-to-end).
  2. Menyesuaikan alur perakitan (assembly flow) untuk pengisi daya kendaraan listrik (EV charger).
  3. Merancang stasiun kerja manufaktur (manufacturing workstation).
  4. Mengelola tenaga kerja (manpower) dan waktu siklus produksi (cycle time).


Production Capacity Planning Intern (Industrial - Purwakarta)

  1. Mengelola kapasitas lini produksi sesuai dengan permintaan pasar.
  2. Melakukan analisis hambatan (bottleneck), pemantauan OEE, dan utilisasi mesin.
  3. Membuat perkiraan (forecasting) kebutuhan mesin baru.


Purchasing Intern (Jakarta Utara)

  1. Menarik data permintaan dari tim marketing dan memperbarui portal berdasarkan status PO yang telah rilis.
  2. Memantau dan melacak progres persetujuan BAST PNT dari FPV pada portal PNT.
  3. Membuat rekapitulasi data item barang habis pakai (consumable) di gudang Cibitung.
  4. Memperbarui formulir pelacakan dan rekapitulasi untuk barang promosi.
  5. Membuat draf PR (Purchase Request) dan penyelesaian (settlement) pada portal permintaan pembayaran.
  6. Mencari (sourcing) vendor untuk barang promosi, merchandise, dan perdagangan umum (general trading).
  7. Menarik data dan melakukan tindak lanjut (follow-up) terkait PP outstanding kepada buyer serta PO outstanding kepada vendor.
raw_requirements:
Latar Belakang Teknik Mesin (Mechanical Engineering):

  1. Mahasiswa AKTIF, minimal tahun kedua atau ketiga
  2. Bersedia menjalani magang secara langsung di lokasi (onsite).
  3. Memiliki pengetahuan dasar di bidang manufaktur, desain, serta perangkat lunak desain 3D (contoh: Solidworks)
  4. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dan analisis berbasis data (data-driven) yang baik.
  5. Mampu mengoperasikan fungsi-fungsi dasar Excel


Latar Belakang Teknik Industri (Industrial Engineering):

  1. Mahasiswa AKTIF, minimal tahun kedua atau ketiga
  2. Bersedia menjalani magang secara langsung di lokasi (onsite).
  3. Akrab/familiar dengan manajemen manufaktur & produksi.
  4. Cekatan dalam kerja sama tim berbasis data serta memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik.
  5. Mampu mengoperasikan fungsi-fungsi dasar Excel.

title: Senior Business Process Analyst - AIHO
organization_name: PT Astra International Tbk - Head Office
raw_description:
Menerima dan memprioritaskan proyek IT di area Sales Operation sesuai kebutuhan bisnis.

Mengonfirmasi dan mendefinisikan kebutuhan bisnis bersama stakeholder.

Menyusun roadmap produk / MVP berdasarkan kebutuhan bisnis.

Mengembangkan konsep high-level untuk proses bisnis dan desain sistem.

Melakukan review terhadap user stories, process flow, business rules, dan system logic.

Memastikan dokumentasi sesuai standar (blueprint).Mengelola backlog serta menentukan prioritas pengembangan.

Mendukung implementasi proyek (project planning, change request, hingga evaluasi pasca go-live). 

Menentukan solusi untuk kebutuhan pengembangan dari user (URF).

• Pendidikan minimal S1/S2, diutamakan Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Industri, atau jurusan terkait.
  • Memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 5 tahun di bidang IT Business Analyst / Product / System Development.
  • Memahami business process design dan business architecture end-to-end.
  • Berpengalaman dalam business process modeling, requirement gathering & analysis.
  • Berpengalaman dalam penyusunan product roadmap, MVP, dan prioritas proyek.
  • Familiar dengan design thinking, user story writing, dan customer journey mapping.
  • Memiliki pengalaman dengan SAP menjadi nilai tambah.
  • Memiliki kemampuan analitis, problem solving, komunikasi, dan stakeholder management yang baik.

title: ADMO - ML Engineer Section Head
raw_description:
• Memimpin dan mengarahkan tim machine learning engineer dalam pengembangan dan implementasi model Data Science (DS) dan Machine Learning (ML).
  • Mengembangkan strategi serta roadmap untuk inisiatif machine learning di dalam perusahaan.
  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim data science, produk, dan engineering untuk mengidentifikasi peluang penerapan ML.
  • Memantau dan mengevaluasi kinerja tim serta memberikan umpan balik dan arahan yang diperlukan.
  • Memastikan kualitas dan akurasi model DS dan ML yang dikembangkan oleh tim.
  • Mengelola proyek ML dari tahap konsep hingga implementasi, memastikan penyelesaian tepat waktu dan sesuai anggaran.
  • Memberikan masukan terkait efisiensi biaya dalam pemeliharaan infrastruktur data.
raw_requirements:
• Gelar Sarjana di Ilmu Komputer, Teknik Informatika, atau bidang terkait
  • Gelar Magister lebih diutamakan.
  • Minimal 5 tahun di bidang ML/DS terapan dengan setidaknya 2 tahun pengalaman pada peran kepemimpinan.
  • Terbukti pengalaman memimpin proyek machine learning dan mengelola tim machine learning engineer
  • Pengalaman langsung membangun, memvalidasi, dan menerapkan model ML (supervised, unsupervised, deep learning).
  • Keterampilan MLOps yang kuat: CI/CD, versioning model, monitoring, A/B testing.
  • Rekam jejak mengelola proyek ML secara end-to-end tepat waktu dan sesuai anggaran.
  • Komunikasi lintas fungsi yang sangat baik dan kemampuan manajemen pemangku kepentingan.
  • Fokus pada kualitas model, tata kelola, skalabilitas, dan keputusan infrastruktur yang hemat biaya.

title: Software Quality Assurance - MODA
raw_description:
1. Merancang rencana pengujian, skenario, skrip, atau prosedur pengujian.
  2. Menyusun jadwal atau strategi pengujian sesuai dengan ruang lingkup proyek dan tenggat waktu pengiriman.
  3. Mengidentifikasi, menganalisis, dan mendokumentasikan masalah terkait fungsi program, output, tampilan layar, atau konten menggunakan sistem pelacakan bug serta melaporkan cacat kepada pengembang perangkat lunak.
  4. Berpartisipasi dalam tinjauan desain produk untuk memberikan masukan terkait persyaratan fungsional, desain produk, jadwal, atau potensi masalah.
  5. Memberikan umpan balik serta rekomendasi kepada pengembang mengenai kegunaan dan fungsionalitas perangkat lunak.
  6. Merancang dan mengembangkan alat pengujian otomatis.
  7. Mengkoordinasikan serta melaksanakan User Acceptance Test (UAT) dan pelatihan pengguna.
  8. Menyelidiki masalah pelanggan yang dirujuk oleh tim dukungan teknis.
raw_requirements:
1. Lulusan Sarjana dari Jurusan Ilmu Komputer, Teknik Informatika atau Sistem Informasi.
  2. Pengalaman kerja sebagai Software Quality Assurance (SQA) minimal 0-2 tahun.
  3. Mampu mengestimasi effort dalam pengujian perangkat lunak.
  4. Memahami serta mampu membuat dokumen skenario pengujian dan UAT serta mengeksekusinya dengan baik.
  5. Memahami dan memiliki pengalaman menggunakan alat pengujian otomatis (Katalon).
  6. Mampu berkomunikasi dengan pengguna maupun tim pengembang internal.

title: B2B Sales Digital - MODA
raw_description:
1. Mencari dan mengembangkan prospek serta calon pelanggan potensial hingga tercapai kesepakatan kerja sama (closed deal).
  2. Memberikan dan mempresentasikan informasi yang detail mengenai produk dan layanan digital kepada calon pelanggan.
  3. Melaksanakan aktivitas customer prospecting untuk meningkatkan data prospek pelanggan serta menyusun laporan aktivitas.
  4. Memantau dan mengevaluasi pelaksanaan strategi pemasaran yang dijalankan.
  5. Menganalisis kebutuhan pelanggan dan berkoordinasi dengan tim Product Specialist untuk memberikan solusi digital yang optimal.
  6. Menyusun struktur biaya untuk setiap aktivitas pembelian, termasuk untuk pesanan baru maupun repeat order.
  7. Mengusulkan ide dan konsep produk yang mendukung pencapaian target pendapatan perusahaan.
  8. Mengelola proses penjualan secara end-to-end dengan pelanggan, termasuk menyiapkan penawaran harga akhir dan kontrak.
  9. Berkolaborasi dengan tim Legal dalam pengajuan, peninjauan, dan finalisasi kontrak serta Service Level Agreement (SLA).
  10. Memantau pembayaran pelanggan secara bulanan.
  11. Menanggapi pertanyaan pelanggan terkait produk secara akurat dan tepat waktu.
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan minimal S1 dari semua jurusan.
  2. Memiliki pengalaman minimal 2 tahun di bidang Sales Software.
  3. Terbukti mampu menangani jumlah akun yang cukup besar.
  4. Berorientasi pada pelanggan, memiliki visi serta business sense yang baik.
  5. Memiliki kemampuan problem solving yang baik.
  6. Individu yang mandiri (self-starter) dengan kemampuan interpersonal, negosiasi, kepemimpinan, dan kerja tim yang sangat baik.

title: Manage Service IoT & Digitalisasi - GSI
raw_description:
1. Melakukan perbaikan serta memberikan dukungan teknis pada perangkat IoT apabila terjadi deviasi.

2. Melakukan monitoring terhadap fungsi dan data perangkat IoT serta Digitalisasi Produk.

3. Melakukan monitoring platform IoT & AI di seluruh job site melalui dashboard pihak pertama.

10. Menyusun dokumentasi instalasi perangkat IoT dan Digitalisasi Produk di job site.

11. Menyusun laporan Berita Acara Serah Terima (BAST) setiap bulan.

title: SDET - Contract-based - ADMO
raw_description:
1. Melakukan validasi terhadap requirement yang telah disusun oleh Product Manager.
  2. Merancang test scenario berdasarkan requirement yang telah disepakati dengan menggunakan teknik design test.
  3. Bekerja sama dengan Developer dan Designer untuk menyusun API kontrak dan UI design.
  4. Mempersiapkan data pengujian dan user account yang akan dibutuhkan untuk mengembangkan script pengujian otomatis.
  5. Menyusun dan memelihara dokumentasi pengujian, termasuk kasus uji dan skrip pengujian.
  6. Merancang, mengembangkan, dan memelihara (maintain) skrip pengujian otomatis, baik fungsional (tes integrasi dan tes end-to-end) maupun non-fungsional (kinerja dan beban kerja) terhadap frontend dan backend untuk memastikan bahwa fitur aplikasi berfungsi sesuai spesifikasi.
  7. Menggunakan alat dan kerangka kerja pengujian otomatis seperti Jest, Playwright, WebDriverIO, Appium, dan BrowserStack.
  8. Melaporkan dan mendokumentasikan hasil pengujian, termasuk bug yang ditemukan, selama pengembangan pernagkat lunak kepada tim pengembangan produk.
raw_requirements:
1. Lulusan Sarjana di bidang Ilmu Komputer, Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, atau bidang terkait lainnya dengan IPK minimal 3,00 / 4,00.
  2. Mampu menerapkan teknik Desain Pengujian dalam pembuatan kasus uji (misalnya Decision Table, Boundary Value Analysis, dan sebagainya).
  3. Menguasai salah satu bahasa pemrograman dasar (misalnya Javascript, Typescript, Java, Python).
  4. Memiliki pengalaman dengan Framework Pengujian Otomatis (misalnya Jest, Playwright, WebdriverIO, Selenium, Robot, Cypress, Mocha).
  5. Memiliki pengalaman dengan konsep Seeding Data.
  6. Memiliki pengalaman dengan konsep API Testing.
  7. Memiliki keterampilan interpersonal yang baik, mampu bekerja dalam tim, serta memiliki empati terhadap pengguna akhir.
  8. Bersedia bekerja di kantor di Ampera, Jakarta Selatan.

major.reason: Sangat Cocok! Pekerjaan ini secara eksplisit mencari lulusan Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, atau bidang IT/Komputer.

gpa.reason: Sesuai. IPK minimal yang diminta adalah 3.00, sedangkan IPK Anda adalah 3.39.

age.reason: Sesuai. Tidak ada batas usia maksimal yang disebutkan secara spesifik.

toefl.reason: Sesuai. Tidak ada syarat nilai TOEFL tertulis secara spesifik.

gender.reason: Sesuai. Lowongan terbuka untuk Pria dan Wanita.

exp_years.reason: Sesuai. Terbuka untuk Fresh Graduate / pengalaman ≤ 1 tahun.

title: Head of Creative, Marketing (Pekanbaru/Medan)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Head of Creative, Marketing (Pekanbaru/Medan)

Daftar Sekarang

Sumatra, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Memberikan arahan kreatif secara menyeluruh untuk seluruh organisasi.

Bertanggung jawab atas keseluruhan ekuitas merek (brand equity) SawitPRO, termasuk positioning di pasar.

Bertanggung jawab atas positioning produk dan merek untuk seluruh produk dan layanan SawitPRO.

Memimpin dan mengelola strategi konten untuk proyek berskala kecil maupun besar, termasuk membuat pedoman dan template untuk desain merek, copywriting, visual, dan aset digital.

Melakukan audit terhadap seluruh hasil karya kreatif dari berbagai tim serta memberikan saran perbaikan untuk meningkatkan keterlibatan dan pengalaman pengguna.

Berpartisipasi dalam seluruh sesi kreatif dan brainstorming dari berbagai tim untuk memberikan ide-ide baru dan inovatif dalam pengembangan produk, peluncuran kampanye pemasaran, serta operasional bisnis.

Mengembangkan pemahaman yang mendalam mengenai persona pelanggan sasaran dan berperan sebagai konsultan internal dalam menentukan pendekatan yang efektif maupun yang kurang efektif bagi pengguna.

Mengajarkan tim untuk mendorong batas kreativitas meskipun dengan keterbatasan anggaran dan waktu.

Tanggung Jawab Utama

Kreativitas Pemasaran - Mengawasi, membimbing, dan mengarahkan hasil kreatif dari seluruh kampanye pemasaran SawitPRO, baik secara online maupun offline.

Kreativitas Desain Produk - Melakukan audit dan memberikan rekomendasi perbaikan terhadap desain produk yang dikembangkan oleh tim Product Management.

Tim Loyalty Management - Membantu dalam proses ideasi, pembuatan, dan perancangan konsep-konsep baru yang inovatif untuk mendorong pertumbuhan program loyalitas.

Tim Customer Experience - Bekerja sama dengan tim eCommerce dan Sales untuk menciptakan ide-ide kreatif yang dapat meningkatkan penjualan produk eCommerce maupun produk offline. Meningkatkan keterlibatan dan loyalitas pelanggan.

Kreativitas Operasional - Bekerja sama dengan tim operasional untuk merancang dan menghasilkan cara-cara kreatif dalam menjalankan operasional bisnis, mulai dari pengelolaan kantor, pengumpulan umpan balik pengguna, pengiriman produk, hingga penyelenggaraan webinar bagi pengguna.

Mengawasi tim lintas fungsi yang terdiri dari Graphic Designer, Copywriter, Social Media Specialist, Photographer/Videographer, dan Product Manager dalam pengembangan strategi komunikasi serta hasil kerja yang akan disampaikan.

Menyelenggarakan sesi brainstorming bersama tim kreatif dengan tetap menerapkan pemikiran strategis untuk menghasilkan inisiatif yang inovatif, dapat diterapkan, dan tetap mempertimbangkan efisiensi anggaran.

Menunjukkan kepemimpinan dan kemampuan manajemen tim yang memadai dalam mendorong pelaksanaan ide-ide kreatif di dalam tim kreatif.

Kualifikasi

Pendidikan

Gelar Sarjana (S1) di bidang Computer Graphics, Game Design, Graphic Design, Industrial Design, Product Design, Interior Design, atau bidang seni kreatif lainnya.

Pengalaman

Minimal 10 tahun pengalaman bekerja sebagai Copywriter, Graphic Designer, Production Artist, Game Designer, Sketch Artist, Interior Designer, atau bidang kreatif terkait.

Memiliki pengalaman dalam mengembangkan model bisnis yang inovatif serta mengembangkan saluran bisnis, model bisnis, atau transformasi bisnis.

Memiliki pengalaman di industri yang berorientasi pada konsumen seperti Fast Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG), perbankan konsumen, asuransi digital, FinTech, sharing economy, dan sejenisnya menjadi nilai tambah.

Memiliki rekam jejak yang terbukti dalam menghasilkan desain kreatif mulai dari tahap ide hingga implementasi.

Memiliki pengetahuan tentang industri kelapa sawit menjadi nilai tambah.

Memiliki pemahaman yang mendalam mengenai berbagai saluran komunikasi, pemasaran, dan periklanan, baik online maupun offline.

Memiliki pengalaman yang terbukti dalam mengelola tim, stakeholder, serta mengawasi proyek desain berskala besar.

Pengetahuan/Keterampilan

Memiliki pemahaman yang mendalam mengenai perilaku, motivasi, dan karakteristik manusia.

Memiliki kemampuan kreativitas visual dan desain grafis yang sangat baik, serta memahami penggunaan warna, tipografi, tata letak, bahasa, persepsi manusia, dan elemen desain lainnya.

Memiliki pemahaman bisnis yang kuat, termasuk pengetahuan spesifik mengenai industri manufaktur, perusahaan berbasis sumber daya alam, serta unit bisnisnya.

Memiliki kemampuan berpikir kreatif, analitis, strategis, konseptual, serta keterampilan konsultasi yang sangat baik.

Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi lisan dan tulisan yang sangat baik, termasuk kemampuan menjelaskan konsep serta teknologi digital kepada para pemimpin bisnis, maupun menjelaskan konsep bisnis kepada berbagai pihak.

Memiliki semangat yang tinggi, idealisme yang kuat, serta visi untuk berkontribusi dalam mewujudkan masa depan Indonesia yang lebih baik.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO adalah perusahaan inovatif yang berkomitmen untuk meningkatkan kualitas hidup seluruh pelaku di industri kelapa sawit. SawitPRO mengembangkan platform agrikultur terintegrasi dari hulu hingga hilir (end-to-end), yang menciptakan manfaat bagi manusia, lingkungan, dan keberlanjutan bisnis. Misi kami adalah meningkatkan kesejahteraan pekebun kelapa sawit swadaya di Indonesia, membuka peluang nilai tambah bagi industri, serta mendorong daya saing di pasar global melalui penerapan ketertelusuran (traceability) dan keberlanjutan produk kelapa sawit.

Kami menyediakan platform yang menghubungkan seluruh pemangku kepentingan dalam rantai pasok industri kelapa sawit, seperti Pabrik Kelapa Sawit (PKS), agen, pekebun swadaya, dan penyedia sarana produksi pertanian. Kami membangun ekosistem digital yang menghilangkan hambatan dalam proses bisnis serta meningkatkan produktivitas pekebun melalui akses terhadap sarana produksi pertanian berkualitas dengan harga terjangkau, layanan agronomi, dan benih unggul berkualitas tinggi.

Kami memiliki visi untuk menjadi penggerak perubahan yang mampu meningkatkan taraf hidup pekebun swadaya sekaligus membantu mewujudkan pemenuhan kebutuhan global akan minyak sawit berkelanjutan.

Daftar Sekarang

title: E-Commerce Executive (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

E-Commerce Executive (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (Full WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Primary Responsibilities

Own, lead and drive the eCommerce business of SawitPRO called Toko Sawit

To drive the online demand for goods and services sold by SawitPRO

Work with different departments to ensure a comprehensive eCommerce strategy for capturing market share, market development and sales of toko Sawit

Ensure high adoption of Toko Sawit

Define the SLAs for Toko Sawit online business

Work closely with operations team to ensure on-time fulfillment of online orders

Own P&L responsibility of Toko Sawit constantly driving towards higher revenues and profits

Role of the eCommerce Executive

eCommerce Strategy

- Develop, own and constantly update end to end eCommerce business strategy for Toko Sawit through innovation and creativity

Customer Experience Management

- Ensure highest standards of online shopping experience for Toko Sawit customers

Category Management

- Ensure the most sought after products are always listed in the product catalog of Toko Sawit. Continuously source for high revenue, high profit products to be listed on Toko Sawit

Revenue Management

- Come up with innovative pricing strategies for products to optimise revenues while serving the

best price guarantee

of SawitPRO

Sales Growth

- Maximise sales revenues for online sales through constant growth of customer base, product catalog, best pricing and customer satisfaction

User adoption

- Ensure high levels of recurring revenue from the existing users, referral business and other strategies for highest standards of user adoption

Promotions and marketing

- Work with marketing team to launch innovative online marketing campaigns and promotions for building the SawitPRO and Toko Sawit brands

Partnerships

-

Collaborate with partnership team to maximise online to offline (O2O) sales, revenues and profits

Performance monitoring

- Constantly monitor Toko Sawit performance to ensure maximum availability of Toko Sawit products. Close inventory monitoring with the operations team to maximize product availability across all regions

eCommerce Loyalty

- Develop loyalty programs for online shopping

Execution KPIs

– clearly define execution goals and KPIs to deliver on the experience portfolio of the organization

P & L

- Manage revenue and costs generated from the online user base

Kualifikasi

Education

Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Business or Marketing discipline is required.

Experience

Min. 2 years’ experience working in eCommerce business, preferably with some independent P&L responsibilities

Experience in innovating business models and developing new channels, business models or business transformation

Palm oil industry knowledge would be helpful

title: Head of Smallholder Relationship (Pekanbaru/Medan)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Head of Smallholder Relationship (Pekanbaru/Medan)

Daftar Sekarang

Sumatra, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full Time (Full WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

About The Job:

As a Head of Smallholder Management in SawitPRO, you will play a pivotal role in managing a team with focus building and maintaining positive relationships with palm oil smallholders, enabling us to deliver meaningful support and resources to enhance their agricultural practices and economic opportunities. The ideal candidate will have a deep understanding of smallholder farming communities, excellent communication skills, and a strong commitment to social impact.

Key Responsibilities:

Lead, coach, and mentor a team of smallholder management professionals, providing guidance, support, and feedback to help them achieve their goals.

Set clear performance targets for the smallholder management team, monitor performance against targets, and take corrective action as needed.

Develop and manage the budget, forecasting revenue and expenses to ensure financial targets are met.

Build and maintain strong relationships with smallholders, especially with our users, by providing support, guidance, and assistance to address their needs and challenges.

Provide smallholder support programs, monitor and evaluate effectiveness, collect feedback and make recommendations, on topics such as sustainable agricultural practices, financial literacy, and market access.

Stay informed about industry trends, competitive offerings, and market developments to identify new business opportunities to enhance smallholder livelihoods.

Convert leads into paying users, prepare and present solution proposals, quotes, and contracts, negotiating terms and closing deals.

Collaborate with internal teams, including demand (leads) generation / marketing, customer support, and product development, to ensure customer satisfaction and drive revenue growth.

Keep accurate records of smallholder support programs, interactions with smallholders, pipeline opportunities, and outcomes using CRM software.

Kualifikasi

Requirements:

Bachelor's degree in Agriculture, Rural Development, Business Administration, Marketing, or any related field.

Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, especially with smallholders in rural areas. Proficiency in local languages spoken in rural areas is highly desirable.

Excellent negotiation and closing skills, with a focus on achieving sales targets and driving revenue growth.

Self-motivated and results-oriented, with a drive to succeed in a fast-paced, competitive environment.

Previous experience of at least 3 years working with smallholder or rural communities to provide solutions for them. Palm oil smallholders are preferred.Previous experience of at least 3 years leading a high-performance team.

Deep understanding of the challenges and opportunities facing smallholder farmers, particularly in the areas of agriculture, livelihoods, and rural development.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the Palm Oil industry. SawitPRO develops an integrated end-to-end agri-platform, creating a win-win-win for people, planet and profit. Our missions are to improve the livelihood of Indonesia’s smallholders, to unlock value for the industry, and to strive in a demanding global market in traceability and sustainability of palm oil products.

We provide platforms that connect the supply chain stakeholders within the palm oil industry (i.e. Palm Oil Mills, Agents, Smallholders, and Agri Input vendors), create a digital ecosystem that removes friction points, and essentially boosts the productivity of the smallholders via access to affordable yet high quality agro-inputs, agronomic services, and high-quality planting materials.

We envision to be the game-changer that improves smallholders’ living standard, and helps our planet to meet the growing global demand for sustainable palm oil.

Daftar Sekarang

title: Senior Software Engineer, Backend (Medan)
location: Medan, Medan City, North Sumatra, Indonesia
raw_description:
< Kembali

Senior Software Engineer, Backend (Medan)

Daftar Sekarang

Medan, Medan City, North Sumatra, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Participate in the complete backend services development life cycle.

Develop backend services according to API specifications.

Integrate external / third party services.

Perform system analysis, design, testing, and documentation whenever necessary.

Write testing for unit and system integration.

Maintain code quality, unit testing, and automation

Provide technical support on on-call rotations.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor's Degree, or Master's Degree, in Computer Science / IT, Engineering (Computer/Telecommunication), or equivalent.

Proficiency in Golang as primary language and other languages such as Java.

Proficiency in Git

Proficiency in PostgreSQL

At least 4 years working experience in backend services using Golang and Postgres database.

Knowledge of RESTful APIs and microservices, experience designing & consuming them

Experience in designing OpenAPI-based API.

Experience in working in cross-functional teams.

Have discipline in writing unit tests and integration tests.

Familiarity with development on cloud services such as GCP and/or AWS.

Familiarity with continuous integration and continuous deployment.

Familiarity with the Scrum development process.

Ready to be placed in Medan or willing to relocate there.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is a cutting-edge green digital agritech startup located in the heart of Jakarta. Our mission is to be the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the palm oil industry. Through our integrated end-to-end agri-platform, we create a win-win-win scenario for people, planet, and prosperity.

We provide integrated apps that connect the supply chain stakeholders in the palm oil industry (Mills, DO Agents, Smallholders, Harvesters, Drivers, etc.). Creating a digital ecosystem that essentially boosts their productivity with effortless work documentation, affordable yet original agri-inputs, and agronomist services.

Our commitment extends beyond providing innovative solutions; we aim to nurture every aspect of Indonesia's palm oil industry. By fostering growth and sustainability, we strive to bring positive change to the lives of individuals in the palm oil sector, one at a time.

Daftar Sekarang

At least 4 years working experience in backend services using Golang and Postgres database.

Knowledge of RESTful APIs and microservices, experience designing & consuming them

Experience in designing OpenAPI-based API.

Experience in working in cross-functional teams.

Have discipline in writing unit tests and integration tests.

Familiarity with development on cloud services such as GCP and/or AWS.

Familiarity with continuous integration and continuous deployment.

Familiarity with the Scrum development process.

Ready to be placed in Pekanbaru or willing to relocate there.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is a cutting-edge green digital agritech startup located in the heart of Jakarta. Our mission is to be the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the palm oil industry. Through our integrated end-to-end agri-platform, we create a win-win-win scenario for people, planet, and prosperity.

We provide integrated apps that connect the supply chain stakeholders in the palm oil industry (Mills, DO Agents, Smallholders, Harvesters, Drivers, etc.). Creating a digital ecosystem that essentially boosts their productivity with effortless work documentation, affordable yet original agri-inputs, and agronomist services.

Our commitment extends beyond providing innovative solutions; we aim to nurture every aspect of Indonesia's palm oil industry. By fostering growth and sustainability, we strive to bring positive change to the lives of individuals in the palm oil sector, one at a time.

title: Senior Software Engineer, Backend
raw_description:
Senior Software Engineer, Backend

Team

Engineering

Location

Jakarta, Indonesia

Job Type

Full-time

The role at a glance

Skills you need

What we offer

Life at Grab

The role at a glance

Get to Know the Team

The Payment Acquiring Team at Grab wants to create a seamless and unified payment experience across our multiple applications. We are a diverse team that uses a variety of coding languages to develop multiple apps, aimed at providing an excellent payment experience for our users.

Get to Know the Role

We are looking for an experienced and experienced Senior Software Engineer to join our iteam. You will lead the development of the latest financial solutions, driving and encouraging a collaborative environment. You will be an Individual Contributor role and reports directly to the Senior Engineering Manager. You will work onsite in our Jakarta Office

The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

Collaborate with teams to design, and ship new features

Establish best practices for development and ensure adherence to coding standards

Optimize application performance and troubleshoot critical issues

Stay up-to-date with the latest technologies and industry trends

Participate in the full software development lifecycle, from concept to deployment

Contribute to technical decision-making and long-term strategy for mobile development

Read more

Skills you need

What Essential Skills You Will Need

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field

4+ years of backend development experience

Proficiency in backend development with Go (Golang)

Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure), compute technologies (e.g., Kubernetes), and CI/CD pipelines

title: Strategy & Planning (GrabBike & GrabExpress) Assistant Manager
raw_description:
Strategy & Planning (GrabBike & GrabExpress) Assistant Manager

Team

Business Strategy

Location

Jakarta, Indonesia

Job Type

Full-time

The role at a glance

Skills you need

What we offer

Life at Grab

The role at a glance

Get to Know the Team

You will be part of the Strategy & Planning team, responsible for driving the GrabBike and GrabExpress business in Grab Indonesia's Expansion territory – the most geographically diverse territory! We leverage data to create demand-generating and supply-shaping strategies to best serve our consumers and partners. Our Strategy & Planning team is made up of Grabbers of various backgrounds – business, statistics, computer science, and engineering – enabling us to have multiple perspectives towards business issues. If you are looking for an environment where you are empowered to solve business issues and lead high impact projects, then you should join our team!

Get to Know the Role

We are looking for an Assistant Manager to be accountable for GrabBike and GrabExpress in Grab Indonesia's Expansion territory. You will manage short- and medium-term strategy formulation, leads and ensures success of several projects by collaborating with cross-functional teams, and serves as an internal advisor for city teams. You will report to the Head of S&P Expansion Territory. This role is onsite and based in Jakarta.

The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

Provide business insights through data analysis, and offer recommendations to improve performance accordingly

Monitor cities' performance, identify potential issues and propose action plans

Lead end to end projects (including to initiate, plan, get stakeholders' buy-in, ensure timely execution, evaluate results and iterate)

Read more

Skills you need

What Essential Skills You Will Need

Bachelor's / Master's degree from reputable universities

Minimum 4 years of work experience in data analysis, business strategy, project management or consultancy.

Proven experience in convincing and getting stakeholders' buy-in for new ideas

Has an eye for details

Proficiency in excel (can maintain complex spreadsheets) and data analysis.

Proficiency in operation programming language (e.g. SQL, R, Phyton) is an added value

English fluency in written and verbal settings to deliver a clear, concise and consistent message to audiences of various backgrounds

title: Lead Software Engineer, Backend - Payments
raw_description:
Lead Software Engineer, Backend - Payments

Team

Engineering

Location

Jakarta, Indonesia

Job Type

Full-time

The role at a glance

Skills you need

What we offer

Life at Grab

The role at a glance

Get to Know the Team

At Financial Services, the Payment team builds end-to-end payment experiences and platforms that help merchants accept payments and grow across Southeast Asia. We empower frictionless checkouts with configurable, developer-friendly capabilities—so partners can embed payments and iterate quickly. From QR payments to lending repayments and in-person acceptance flows, we work across multiple payment journeys to deliver reliable user and merchant outcomes.

Get to Know the Role

We are looking for a experienced and passionate backend engineer to join our Tech Family. You will develop scalable backend systems that power products used by millions of people across Southeast Asia. You will be expected to take ownership of complex technical problems end to end, drive high-quality execution, and raise the engineering bar through strong technical judgment, collaboration, and mentorship. Reporting to the Engineering Manager, you will be based in our Jakarta Office

The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

Lead the design, and operation of scalable, maintainable, and reliable backend services and platform components.

Convert product and requirements into technical solutions while driving design discussions and architectural trade-offs.

Oversee the delivery of high-quality code by maintaining standards in testing, performance, observability, and rigorous code reviews.

Partner with product, business, mobile, web, data, and infrastructure teams to solve end-to-end-user and system challenges.

Improve service reliability through monitoring, proactive system health fixes, incident response, and root cause analysis.

Participate in the team's on-call rotation and take active ownership during production incidents.

Guide engineers through technical coaching, design reviews, and knowledge sharing.

Identify and guide ongoing improvements in engineering processes, developer productivity, and overall system health.

Read more

Skills you need

What Essential Skills You Will Need

Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.

6+ years of software engineering experience, with backend development experience in production environments.

title: Credit Operation Associate
raw_description:
Credit Operation Associate

Team

Financial Services

Location

Jakarta, Indonesia

Job Type

Full-time

The role at a glance

Skills you need

What we offer

Life at Grab

The role at a glance

Get to Know the Team

The Credit Ops team manages daily credit underwriting operations and safeguards underwriting SLAs across the country. The team works collaboratively and supports one another especially audit readiness. If you enjoy working in a team environment and are looking for a place to grow together, we invite you to join us.

Get to Know the Role

You will manage end-to-end credit underwriting for loans using external credit bureau data and supporting documents where required. You will help ensure underwriting SLA delivery to support sound decision-making and operational continuity. You will also deliver audit-ready regulatory-to-control mapping and maintain traceable evidence packages against agreed milestones. You will also implement existing credit SOP and policy requirements, implement updates linked to audit controls, and ensure clear ownership and risk mitigation. You will drive continuous improvement in key risk metrics and provides fact-based, data-driven reporting to senior and executive management. You will report to the Head, Credit Ops & Collection, working onsite at the Jakarta office.

The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

Lead end-to-end underwriting operations and SLA management for loans in Indonesia.

Design data and analysis approaches to solve business problems while maintaining an acceptable level of risk.

Manage the lending portfolio, including recommending actions to address performance or risk issues.

Collaborate with business, engineering, compliance, collections, legal, finance, and regional teams to support credit operations.

Read more

Skills you need

What Essential Skills You Will Need

A recognized degree, in Business, Finance, Operations Management, Economics, Computer Science, or a related field.

3+ years of full-time experience supporting SME loans and broader consumer lending underwriting or credit operations.

Experience reviewing and interpreting external credit bureau data and using supporting documentation to support loan decisions.

Experience collaborating with cross-functional stakeholders and driving accountability for execution and approvals.

Experience delivering tangible results across previous roles.

Experience creating and updating SOPs and policies aligned with control requirements, such as audit or regulatory controls.

title: TechOps, AI Operations & Automation Specialist
raw_description:
TechOps, AI Operations & Automation Specialist

Team

Engineering

Location

Jakarta, Indonesia

Job Type

Full-time

The role at a glance

Skills you need

What we offer

Life at Grab

The role at a glance

Get to Know the Team

Our team builds and operates automation that improves how work gets done across the business. We focus on reducing manual effort, improving reliability, and scaling workflows through AI-powered tools, chatbots, system integrations, and engineering automation.

We work across the full lifecycle of automation from design to production support and continuous improvement. Because we embed these automations in daily operations, we also place emphasis on observability, incident response, and operational resilience.

Get to Know the Role

As an AI Operations and Automation Specialist, you will design, build, and support automation that streamlines internal workflows and improves team efficiency. You will combine hands-on automation engineering with operational ownership, giving you end-to-end responsibility from development through production support.

You will work with AI/LLM platforms, chatbot and integration frameworks, CI/CD pipelines, and observability tools to deliver reliable automation. You will also help manage incidents, troubleshoot issues, and strengthen the team's operating processes through better tooling, documentation, and continuous improvement. You will report to the Tech Support Engineering Manager and onsite in the Jakarta office based.

The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

Develop automation for internal workflows using AI/LLM platforms, chatbot tools, and integration frameworks.

Ensure automation is secure, scalable, reliable, and aligned with engineering and compliance standards.

Maintain troubleshoot automation code, repositories, merge requests, and CI/CD pipelines in GitLab.

Improve existing automation by maintaining, refactoring, and hardening solutions over time.

Assessment, investigate, and resolve incidents affecting automations and related services, including participation in war-room calls when needed.

Communicate incident status, impact, and recovery progress clearly to stakeholders, while coordinating across all kinds of teams.

Use tools such as Elasticsearch, Kibana, Datadog, and other observability platforms to monitor automation health, investigate failures, and identify root causes.

Maintain SOPs, runbooks, and operational documentation for automation support and incident handling.

Contribute actively to Agile/Scrum ceremonies, including sprint planning, stand-ups, backlog refinement, reviews, and retrospectives.

Identify opportunities to improve workflows, reduce manual effort, and strengthen operational reliability through code and automation.

Read more

title: VP-Head of Financial Non Bank
raw_description:
Role Purpose

VP-Head of Sales is responsible for leading multiple sales teams through Sales Managers to drive segment-level revenue growth, strategic account expansion, and long-term customer value.
This role focuses on defining and executing sales strategies across a portfolio of accounts, ensuring alignment with organizational goals and market opportunities. VP-Head of Sales provides direction and oversight to AVP-Head of Sales or any Account Directors, ensuring consistent execution of account plans, pipeline development, and performance management across teams.
In addition, the role requires strong engagement with senior customer stakeholders, guidance on complex sales opportunities, and oversight of forecasting and business performance. VP-Head of Sales acts as a key link between senior leadership and the sales organization, ensuring strategies are effectively translated into execution and delivering sustainable business growth.

Job Details

Responsibilities:

  • Design and develop end-to-end IT solutions for B2B Financial Non Bank clients.
  • Translate business needs into functional and technical specifications.
  • Identify technological enhancements to drive operational efficiency and customer value.
  • Collaborate with the sales team to understand client needs and strategic direction.
  • Conduct client meetings to gather requirements and present solution options.
  • Provide technical support in client presentations and negotiations.
  • Define project scope, objectives, technical requirements, timelines, and budgets.
  • Align internal teams and resources based on project milestones.
  • Monitor and report project progress against targets.
  • Stay current with trends and emerging technologies in supply chain, energy, and digital transformation.
  • Proactively recommend innovations and technology applications.
  • Drive digital enablement across B2B client solutions.
  • Coordinate across IT, product, and operations teams to ensure solution delivery.
  • Lead multidisciplinary teams during solution development and implementation.
  • Provide coaching and mentoring to solution architects and analysts.

 

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
  • Master’s Degree in Business Administration, Information Systems, or relevant field is preferred.
  • Minimum 12–15 years of professional experience in IT solution development, enterprise systems, digital infrastructure, ICT, cloud computing, ERP
  • At least 5-7 years in a leadership role managing large-scale, cross-functional projects
  • Proven experience in designing and implementing technology-driven solutions for B2B clients in the Financial Non Bank sector
  • Strong background in working directly with enterprise clients and senior stakeholders
  • Strategic thinking and commercial acumen in B2B technology environments.
  • Strong project management and budgeting skills.
  • Exceptional communication, stakeholder management, and presentation skills.
  • Ability to translate complex business requirements into scalable, cost-effective technical solutions.
  • Leadership, mentoring, and cross-functional team collaboration abilities.
  • Adaptability in fast-paced, client-driven environments.
  • Proven track record in driving segment/portfolio-level revenue growth
  • Strong experience in strategic account management and large-scale deals
  • Experience leading large sales organizations or multi-region coverage

title: AVP-Product Sales Specialist - Ads & Analytics
raw_description:
Job Details

The role is responsible for leading the sales support function by enabling Sales teams with strong solutioning, commercial structuring, and product positioning. This role ensures enterprise opportunities are supported with the right technical and commercial solutions to improve deal conversion and accelerate revenue realization.

 

The role acts as the bridge between Product, Sales, Technology, and Partnerships to ensure seamless commercialization of the company’s product portfolio:

  • Collect & analyze data (pipeline & deals won/lost)
  • Provide insights; trends, opportunities & guidance to optimize products
  • Create monthly report to track growth & progress
  • Provide insights & recommendations to enhance/optimize the process.

Job Details

Minimum Requirements:

  • Minimum S1 degree from a reputable university, majoring in Business Management/Administration, Marketing Communication, or Information Technology.
  • At least 3 years of experience in sales or similar roles, preferably with exposure to government sector projects.
  • Strong knowledge of word processing, spreadsheet, database, and presentation software.
  • Proficient in CRM software.
  • Strong communication skills, with the ability to engage effectively with different industries and stakeholders.
  • Familiarity with telecommunications products and services.
  • Strong projection and forecasting skills to drive business growth.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively with cross-functional teams.

 

Area of Responsibilities:

Sales enablement

  • Lead solutioning support for enterprise opportunities across the product portfolio
  • Work with Sales teams to design tailored solutions aligned with customer needs
  • Support proposal development, RFP responses, and technical presentations
  • Develop sales toolkits including
  • Train sales teams on product capabilities and solution positioning

 

Commercial enablement

  • Provide guidance on pricing structures and commercial models for complex deals
  • Align product capabilities with client business requirements and revenue objectives
  • Support negotiations with enterprise clients

 

Pipeline management

  • Track pipeline performance and conversion metrics
  • Analyze deal performance to identify opportunities for improvement
  • Provide insights and recommendations to improve sales effectiveness

title: Sr Officer-Home Installation & Infrastructure
raw_description:
The Senior Officer – Home Installation & Infrastructure is responsible for ensuring the successful installation, activation, maintenance, and continuous improvement of fiber optic and FTTH (Fiber-to-the-Home) networks. The role supports end-to-end customer connectivity by performing home installations, troubleshooting service issues, maintaining network infrastructure, and coordinating with internal teams and external vendors to ensure service quality and SLA achievement.

 

Key Responsibilities:

1.Home Installation

  • Perform end-to-end internet and WiFi installations at customer premises.
  • Install and configure fiber optic connections, including cable pulling to customer locations.
  • Configure and activate modems, ONTs, routers, and IPTV services.
  • Conduct connection testing and internet speed verification to ensure service quality.
  • Provide basic education to customers on the use of WiFi equipment and internet services.
  • Perform initial troubleshooting during installation and resolve basic technical issues.
  • Ensure customers are successfully activated and connected to the network in accordance with company standards.

 

2.Infrastructure Management:

  • Execute the development, expansion, and maintenance of FTTH and fiber optic infrastructure.
  • Install and maintain network components, including ODPs, splitters, FATs, closures, poles, and related infrastructure.
  • Perform backbone and distribution fiber cable deployment activities.
  • Conduct field surveys and route assessments for network expansion projects.
  • Troubleshoot and repair fiber optic network disruptions to maintain service continuity.
  • Monitor network quality and recommend improvements where necessary.Support homepass expansion initiatives to increase network coverage.
  • Coordinate with infrastructure vendors and partners (e.g., IFORTE, Asianet, and other contractors) to ensure project execution and maintenance activities are completed effectively.
  • Ensure installation and maintenance activities meet the company's Service Level Agreement (SLA) targets and operational standards.

 

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree or Diploma in Telecommunications Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or a related field.
  • Minimum 3 years of experience in FTTH installation, fiber optic infrastructure, or telecommunications network operations.
  • Strong understanding of fiber optic networks and FTTH infrastructure.
  • Hands-on experience in internet/WiFi installation and fiber optic network maintenance.
  • Proficient in configuring modems, ONTs, routers, and activating internet/IPTV services.
  • Knowledge of network infrastructure components, including ODPs, splitters, FATs, closures, poles, and related equipment.
  • Familiar with fiber optic backbone and distribution network architecture.
  • Strong troubleshooting skills for internet connectivity and fiber optic network issues.
  • Ability to perform network testing, quality monitoring, and basic diagnostic activities.
  • Experience conducting site surveys and planning cable routes.
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills to effectively engage with customers, vendors, and internal stakeholders.
  • Able to work independently as well as collaboratively within field operations teams.
  • Willing to work in a mobile, field-based environment and meet operational targets.
  • Strong commitment to safety, service excellence, and achieving installation and maintenance SLAs.

title: AVP-Technical Business Development Specialist (Cybersecurity)
raw_description:
Role Purpose

Own the Security-led growth engine within the Technical Business Development unit to deliver realized revenue for Indosat Business. This role acts as a Strategic Solution Lead and Commercial Architect, bridging the gap between complex Cybersecurity principles and scalable revenue. The AVP is responsible for translating complex security technology into business outcomes, shaping high-value opportunities early with BD and Sales, and ensuring the successful adoption of the security portfolio within the B2B segment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Incubate and shape high-value opportunities: Lead customer/opportunity discovery sessions to validate business outcomes, identify stakeholders, and build a clear value storyline before the formal proposal stage
  • Translate architecture into business value: Translate complex security principles (e.g., Cybersecurity, SOC, CTI, IAM, Network Security, and Cloud Security) into business-ready narratives that focus on ROI, TCO, and customer pain points.
  • Support Sales, Presales, and Product teams: Act as a opportunity shaper, help define solution direction, scope, and commercial approach early so opportunities are proposal-ready and deliverable.
  • Own security pipeline governance: Maintain high-integrity pipeline data (especially strategic pipelines), ensuring stage discipline, risk tracking, and accurate revenue forecasting for leadership.
  • Validate solution logic: Handle key technical objections at an architectural level to ensure the security solution is fit-for-purpose and aligns with the customer's strategic objectives

Job Summary

  • Revenue & Adoption Delivery: Deliver IOH Business revenue target by operationalizing Security-led opportunities into realized billing.
  • Opportunity Shaping: Incubate strategic deals early to improve win probability, validate solution direction, and shorten the sales cycle.
  • Governance & Reporting: Maintain high-integrity pipeline governance to drive prioritization and provide leadership with predictable forecasts.

 

Qualifications:

    • Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or Business.
    • Background in Sales Specialist, Technical Sales, Cybersecurity Product, Security Presales, or Security Solution Architect roles with a strong cybersecurity knowledge, and adequate communication skill, commercial and revenue orientation.
    • Professional security certifications (e.g., CISSP, CISM, or vendor-specific certifications from Palo Alto, Fortinet, or Cisco) are highly regarded.
    • 7+ years of experience in the Cybersecurity and enterprise solutions ecosystem.
      • Proven experience in opportunity shaping and managing multi-stakeholder customer engagements.
      • Experience in translating customer painpoints into deliverable security roadmaps.

title: AVP-Account Director
raw_description:
Role Summary

The Account Director is responsible for strategic client management, ensuring long-term client satisfaction, revenue growth, and acting as the main liaison between clients and internal teams.

Find and pitch complex opportunities from existing or Greenfields Account. Orchestrating with internal and external stakeholder for Core, ICT and IoT and Techco project

 

The role consists of: nurturing and fastening large enterprise account to use Indosat B2B products & services, a “close win”. All team members approach with effective and efficient manner, increase the exposure of Indosat B2B products & services in the marketplace and customer centric focus to maintain loyalty.

Responsibilities:

Sales Execution

  • Plan and execute corporate sales activities for Indosat Business services.
  • Evaluate and create program to improve customer productivity in term of services usage.
  • Coordinate with Enterprise Sales Solution, Marketing, Product Development, Technical and other supporting functions concerning proposal preparation of offering solution and pricing that needed by customer.
  • Coordinate with Major Events to retain customer and increase customer loyalty.
  • Evaluate achievement of target production and revenue from Customer in Bank and Financial Segment

Account Management

  • Prospecting customer and regularly update customer with Indosat B2B products and services
  • Manage sales plan with sales team
  • Validate & update customer credit rating
  • Manage sales team activities
  • Manage all sales team pipeline & sales forecast
  • Cross/Up Selling
  • Manage Bid
  • Develop Sales Project Proposals
  • Manage sales workforce
  • Manage sales performance

Customer Management & Market Analysis

  • Conduct reporting of the sales activities and performance
  • Perform account monitoring and maintenance, Give feedback to Marketing, Product Development and Technical functions concerning trend of service need, market pricing and customer potential.

Sales & Campaign Management

  • Issue and Distribute Marketing Collaterals
  • Manage and track leads

Lead, initiate, and accomplish strategic project with strategic customers.

  • Initiate new project, conducting and lead the action involving marketing, presales, provisioning after-sales team.

Team collaboration

  • Execute and achieve functional goals given by Head of Division (Superior)
  • Work co-operatively with other team members to accomplished delegated tasks assigned by managers
  • Provide support, when appropriate, for the team in cases of absence or unavailability
  • Provide continuous inputs on business process and systems improvement

 

Minimum Requirement

  • Minimum Bachelor Degree in any major
  • 7+ years of B2B Tech sales experience with experience in selling ICT, Telco products to Government Accounts.
  • Previous experience as a sales executive, sales manager, account manager for multi segment, or presales/sales consultant/project management. Preferably coming from SI company have an engineering knowledge
  • Proven knowledge and experience in Techo solution
  • Proven ability in monitor and evaluate the performance, make recommendations and also ability to give right direction and use initiative and judgment
  • Having knowledge about the B2B business model and sales methodology
  • Good Networking and Engagement with Top Level in Financial Segment
  • Proven track record of achieving or exceeding sales targets
  • Experience managing mid-to-large accounts independently
  • Strong capability in end-to-end sales cycle
  • Solid negotiation and client management skills
  • Experience handling strategic or high-value accounts
  • Strong consultative selling and solution positioning capability
  • Ability to manage complex stakeholder environments
  • Good communication, negotiation, presentation, and report writing skills
  • Good analytical thinking
  • Demonstrated ability to build and maintain a strong sales pipeline
  • Flexible and adaptable in under pressure situations and meet short- and long-term deadlines
  • Able to use Microsoft office (excel, ppt, doc, etc)

title: AVP-Account Director SEA
raw_description:
Job Details

Role Purpose

The Account Director is responsible for strategic client management, ensuring long-term client satisfaction, revenue growth, and acting as the main liaison between clients and internal teams.

Find and pitch complex opportunities from existing or Greenfields Account. Orchestrating with internal and external stakeholder for Core,ICT and IoT and Techco project

 

The role consists of: nurturing and fastening large enterprise account to use Indosat B2B products & services, a “close win”. All team members approach with effective and efficient manner, increase the exposure of Indosat B2B products & services in the market place and customer centric focus to maintain loyalty.

 

Responsibility

 

Sales Execution

  • Plan and execute corporate sales activities for Indosat Business services.
  • Evaluate and create program to improve customer productivity in term of services usage.
  • Coordinate with Enterprise Sales Solution, Marketing, Product Development, Technical and other supporting functions concerning proposal preparation of offering solution and pricing that needed by customer.
  • Coordinate with Major Events to retain customer and increase customer loyalty.
  • Evaluate achievement of target production and revenue from Customer in Bank and Financial Segment

Account Management

  • Prospecting customer and regularly update customer with Indosat B2B products and services
  • Manage sales plan with sales team
  • Validate & update customer credit rating
  • Manage sales team activities
  • Manage all sales team pipeline & sales forecast
  • Cross/Up Selling
  • Manage Bid
  • Develop Sales Project Proposals
  • Manage sales workforce
  • Manage sales performance

Customer Management & Market Analysis

  • Conduct reporting of the sales activities and performance
  • Perform account monitoring and maintenance, Give feedback to Marketing, Product Development and Technical functions concerning trend of service need, market pricing and customer potential.

Sales & Campaign Management

  • Issue and Distribute Marketing Collaterals
  • Manage and track leads

Lead, initiate, and accomplish strategic project with strategic customers.

  • Initiate new project, conducting and lead the action involving marketing, presales, provisioning after-sales team.

Team collaboration

  • Execute and achieve functional goals given by Head of Division (Superior)
  • Work co-operatively with other team members to accomplished delegated tasks assigned by managers
  • Provide support, when appropriate, for the team in cases of absence or unavailability
  • Provide continuous inputs on business process and systems improvement

Requirements

Minimum Requirements

  • Minimum Bachelor Degree in any major
  • 7+ years of B2B Tech sales experience with experience in selling ICT, Telco products to financial services industries.
  • Previous experience as a sales executive, sales manager, account manager for multi segment, or presales/sales consultant/project management. Preferably coming from SI company have an engineering knowledge
  • Proven knowledge and experience in Techo solution
  • Proven ability in monitor and evaluate the performance, make recommendations and also ability to give right direction and use initiative and judgment
  • Having knowledge about the B2B business model and sales methodology
  • Good Networking and Engagement with Top Level in Financial Segment
  • Proven track record of achieving or exceeding sales targets
  • Experience managing mid-to-large accounts independently
  • Strong capability in end-to-end sales cycle
  • Solid negotiation and client management skills
  • Experience handling strategic or high-value accounts
  • Strong consultative selling and solution positioning capability
  • Ability to manage complex stakeholder environments
  • Good communication, negotiation, presentation, and report writing skills
  • Good analytical thinking
  • Demonstrated ability to build and maintain a strong sales pipeline
  • Flexible and adaptable in under pressure situations and meet short- and long-term deadlines
  • Able to use Microsoft office (excel, ppt, doc, etc)
