title: Officer-Sourcing Circle
raw_description:
Job Description

Manage end-to-end sourcing and procurement activities, including tender management, supplier selection, commercial negotiations, contract and purchase order administration, vendor performance management, and cost optimization, ensuring the best Total Cost of Ownership (TCO), timely project delivery, and alignment with business objectives.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

1. Sourcing & Tender Management

  • Manage end-to-end sourcing activities, including RFP/RFQ preparation, tender execution, supplier evaluation, and vendor selection.
  • Review and validate Bill of Quantities (BoQ) and Scope of Work (SoW) submitted by users.
  • Launch and manage tender processes through Coupa and other approved procurement platforms.
  • Coordinate with internal stakeholders and vendors throughout the procurement cycle.

2. Commercial Negotiation & Cost Optimization

  • Analyze supplier proposals and commercial bids.
  • Lead price, contract, and commercial negotiations to achieve targeted cost savings and optimal TCO.
  • Recommend vendor awards based on commercial, technical, quality, and performance considerations.
  • Support procurement initiatives that drive operational efficiency and cost reduction.

3. Contract & Purchase Order Management

  • Prepare and process Purchase Orders (POs) and contracts in accordance with company policies and timelines.
  • Monitor contract execution and vendor compliance.
  • Ensure timely delivery of procured products and services to support business requirements.

4. Vendor & Stakeholder Management

  • Maintain effective communication and relationships with suppliers and internal stakeholders.
  • Resolve vendor-related issues, including vendor blocking and performance concerns.
  • Act as the company's representative in external procurement and supplier engagements.

5. Reporting & Continuous Improvement

  • Prepare weekly procurement reports and ad-hoc reports as requested by management.
  • Support process improvement initiatives to enhance procurement effectiveness and efficiency.
  • Ensure compliance with procurement policies, procedures, and governance standards.

6. Team Collaboration

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to achieve departmental and organizational objectives.
  • Provide procurement support and guidance to business users.
  • Contribute to team initiatives and successfully deliver assigned tasks and projects.

Minimum Requirement

 

Qualification:

Bachelor's Degree in Finance, Economics, Information Technology, Engineering, or other relevant disciplines. Relevant postgraduate qualification will be an advantage.

 

Experience:

  • Minimum 1 year of relevant working experience in Procurement, Sourcing, Supply Chain, or related functions, with demonstrated negotiation skills and strong commercial acumen.
  • Experience in managing spend categories related to Sales & Marketing, such as BTL Printing, Branding, Event Activation, POSM, Media Placement, and similar categories.
  • Exposure to Network and Facility-related procurement categories will be an added advantage.

 

Skills:

  • Critical Thinking - Using logic and reasoning to identify the strengths and weaknesses of alternative solutions, conclusions, or approaches to problems.
  • Understand the business process as well as end to end process of RFP/RFQ system.
  • Able to work effectively with stakeholder, management, and suppliers  
  • Team player with good working conduct and ethics coupled with ability to manage pressure
  • Possess high standard of personal and professional integrity
  • Good of both written and spoken Bahasa Indonesia and English
  • Good in presentation skills both written & oral and be familiar with Microsoft Excel, Power Point and Word software

title: AVP-Devices
raw_description:
Reports to: EVP-Head of National Sales & Distribution

 

Job Summary:

Senior Device Partnership & Commercialization is responsible for driving device-led commercial growth by identifying, developing, and managing strategic partnerships with device manufacturers and distributors. The role focuses on increasing customer penetration in device ownership, including second-device adoption and replacement, by enabling compelling device propositions across sales channels. This role also covers development of IOH system compatibility to all devices used by our customer/consumers in the market. This role will make sure IOH winning proposition through devices used.

This role acts as a subject matter expert in the device ecosystem—combining deep understanding of device industry trends, product specifications, and customer needs to recommend the right device portfolio, pricing approach, and bundling strategies. The role is accountable for shaping device roadmaps, evaluating device capabilities and translating technical features into clear commercial value propositions that can be effectively sold in walking stores and other distribution channels.

The role works cross-functionally with commercial, sales, supply chain, and marketing teams to ensure seamless execution of device programs—from partnership alignment and device selection to logistics readiness and in-store availability. It also supports sales teams by defining how devices should be positioned and sold to maximize conversion and customer value.

Ultimately, this role plays a key part in unlocking incremental revenue through device bundling, strengthening partner ecosystems, and enhancing overall customer experience without direct team management responsibility.

 

Key Responsibilities:

  • Partnership Development & Management

Identify, evaluate, and establish strategic partnerships with device manufacturers, devices outlets and distributors. Negotiate commercial terms and align joint business plans. Strong and sustainable device partner ecosystem

Deliverables: # of active strategic partnerships; partnership revenue contribution (%); commercial deal margin / profitability

 

  • Device Portfolio Strategy & Roadmap

Define device portfolio (smartphones, routers, FWA devices, etc.) aligned with target segments and business strategy. Build short- and long-term device roadmap.

Deliverables: Device portfolio hit rate (sell-through %); time-to-market for new devices; portfolio contribution to total sales (%)

 

  • Commercialization & Bundling Strategy

Design device + service bundling strategies (e.g., FTTH, FWA, mobile bundles). Define pricing, subsidy, and promotion schemes.

Deliverables: Device attach rate (%); bundle penetration (%); incremental revenue from bundles

 

  • Device Capability & Value Proposition

Analyze device specifications and translate them into clear, customer-centric selling points. Ensure alignment with network/service advantages. Strong and differentiated value proposition

Deliverables: Conversion rate in stores (%); sales effectiveness (device sell-out per store); customer uptake of targeted devices

 

  • Channel Enablement & Sales Support

Equip sales channels (walking stores, frontline teams) with the right positioning, training materials, and selling guidelines. Improved frontline sales capability and execution

Deliverables: Sales productivity per store; mystery shopping/sales quality score; training effectiveness score

 

  • Supply Chain & Logistics Alignment

Collaborate with supply chain teams to ensure device availability, demand planning, and distribution readiness.

Deliverables: Stock availability rate (%); inventory turnover days; stock-out/overstock incidents

 

  • Cross-functional Program Execution

Coordinate across commercial, marketing, sales, and operations teams to execute device programs end-to-end. Seamless and timely execution of device initiatives

Deliverables: On-time program launch (%); execution quality score; cross-function project SLA adherence

 

  • Performance Tracking & Optimization

Monitor device sales performance, customer behavior, and market trends. Continuously refine strategy and partnerships. Continuous performance improvement and growth

Deliverables: Device GMV / revenue growth (%); sell-through vs forecast accuracy; ROI of device programs

 

Job Qualification:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Telecommunications, or related field MBA or Master’s degree is an advantage
  • Experience 7-10+ years of relevant experience
  • Proven track record in device industry, telco, or consumer electronics commercial roles
  • Experience in device partnership management, portfolio strategy, and go-to-market execution
  • Hands-on exposure to device lifecycle management (selection, pricing, launch, sell-out)
  • Experience in bundling devices with services and working with cross-functional teams

 

Technical Skills:

  • Strong understanding of device ecosystem, specifications, and technology trends
  • Expertise in commercial strategy, pricing, and bundling models
  • Ability to translate technical device features into customer value propositions
  • Strong data analysis and performance tracking capability
  • Good understanding of sales channels and basic supply chain/logistics for devices

title: AVP-Home Installation & Infrastructure
raw_description:
Long Description

Job Qualification:      
1. Education & Experience      
2. Bachelor’s degree in Telecommunications, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, or related field  
3. Minimum 8–12 years of experience in telecommunications, preferably in broadband (FTTH/FWA) operations, installation, or network operations
4. Proven experience in managing vendors/partners and large-scale field execution    
5. Technical & Functional Competencies    
Strong understanding of:      
1. HBB technologies (FTTH, FWA, last-mile infrastructure)    
2. Installation processes, provisioning, and activation lifecycle    
3. Network troubleshooting and incident management    
4. Experience in SLA management, service delivery governance, and performance tracking    
5. Familiarity with ticketing systems, workforce management tools, and network monitoring systems  
6. Ability to analyze operational data and drive continuous improvement initiatives    

 

Long Description

The AVP, HBB Infrastructure & Installation (Circle), is responsible for leading end-to-end Home Broadband service delivery, installation operations, and infrastructure readiness across the circle. The role ensures timely customer activation, high installation quality, network reliability, and effective post-installation support while meeting business, operational, and customer experience targets.The position provides strategic leadership to field operations, technical teams, and service partners to drive operational excellence, SLA achievement, customer satisfaction, and sustainable subscriber growth. Through strong governance, performance management, and continuous improvement initiatives, the role ensures efficient execution, service quality, and long-term business success.

title: Medco E & P Indonesia - Field CMS Engineer (TPC)
raw_description:
Medco E & P Indonesia is looking for a Field CMS Engineer to join our team through a Third-Party Contract (TPC). In this role, you will contribute to Sakakemang PSC, an upstream oil and gas project located in South Sumatra and operated by MedcoEnergi. Currently in the development phase, the project is progressing toward First Gas/First Production, with start-up targeted for Q3 2027.


As a Field CMS Engineer, you will be responsible for managing Completion Management System (CMS) throughout the construction, pre-commissioning, and commissioning phases, ensuring accurate tracking of project completion activities and a smooth handover to Operations.


Key Responsibilities

  • Administer and maintain the Completion Management System (CMS) database throughout construction and commissioning.
  • Ensure accurate tracking of systemization, mechanical completion, punch lists, turnover documentation, and handover activities.
  • Generate completion reports, certificates, and status updates to support commissioning, start-up, and project closeout.
  • Coordinate CMS activities with project teams, contractors, and stakeholders to ensure data accuracy and process alignment.
  • Maintain project completion records and ensure compliance with project and operator requirements.
raw_requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in Engineering or a related technical discipline.
  • Minimum 6 years of relevant experience, including at least 4 years supporting commissioning activities in the oil & gas industry.
  • Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with Completion Management Systems (CMS).
  • Experience supporting major EPC oil & gas projects during construction, pre-commissioning, and commissioning phases.
  • Strong knowledge of systemization, mechanical completion, commissioning dossiers, test packs, turnover documentation, and punch list management.
  • Proficient in CMS administration, data management, and reporting.
  • Good command of written and spoken English.
  • Willing to work on a remote project site on a rotational or site-based assignment.


Disclaimer: The selected candidate will be engaged on a contract basis through a third-party company appointed by MedcoEnergi. This role supports MedcoEnergi's projects and business objectives, and is delivered in alignment with the Company's standards, governance, and operational requirements.

title: Genting Oil Kasuri Pte. Ltd. - Operation Supervisor
raw_description:
• Supervise, plan, and manage overall production activities to ensure safe, efficient, and compliant operations.
  • Lead and control Production Operators, Field Operators, and Panel Operators to achieve production targets and Operation Department KPIs.
  • Monitor hydrocarbon production, utility systems, and produced water treatment in compliance with MARPOL, MIGAS, and Company requirements.
  • Coordinate with Production Engineers, Process Engineers, and Maintenance Supervisors to support production, well testing, and maintenance activities.
  • Support well testing and perform Critical Function Test on SCSSV using API Standards.
  • Manage production start-up, process upsets, and equipment performance to minimize production losses.
  • Ensure personnel competency, maintain handover logs and reports, and coordinate activities under the PTW System.
  • Initiate production improvements through MOC to enhance production efficiency and optimize resources.
raw_requirements:
• Minimum Diploma 3 (D3) or Bachelor's Degree in Chemical, Petroleum, or Mechanical Engineering.
  • Minimum 12 years of experience in Oil & Gas Operations, including 1 year as an Operation Supervisor in onshore Oil & Gas facilities.
  • Minimum 1 year of experience as a Gas Plant Supervisor/Leader.
  • Experience operating gas well facilities with a minimum capacity of 50 MMSCFD.

title: Medco E & P Indonesia - Civil Construction Supervisor (TPC)
raw_description:
MedcoEnergi is looking for an experienced Civil Construction Supervisor to join our team through a Third-Party Contract (TPC). In this role, you will contribute to Sakakemang PSC, an upstream oil and gas project located in South Sumatra and operated by MedcoEnergi. Currently in the development phase, the project is progressing toward First Gas/First Production, with start-up targeted for Q3 2027.


In this role, you will represent the Owner at site, ensuring civil construction activities are executed safely, efficiently, and in accordance with approved designs, quality standards, project specifications, and HSE requirements.


Key Responsibilities

  • Supervise and monitor civil construction works, including earthworks, foundations, concrete structures, buildings, roads, drainage, and underground facilities.
  • Ensure compliance with approved drawings, specifications, construction procedures, and quality standards.
  • Promote and enforce HSE requirements and safe work practices throughout project execution.
  • Monitor construction progress, identify potential issues, and coordinate with contractors and project stakeholders to ensure timely delivery.
  • Review quality documentation, witness inspections, and ensure non-conformities are resolved.
raw_requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering or a related discipline.
  • Minimum 13 years of experience in civil construction, preferably in oil & gas, energy, petrochemical, or major industrial projects.
  • Proven experience as a Civil Construction Supervisor, Construction Supervisor, or Site Engineer on large-scale EPC projects.
  • Strong knowledge of construction execution, HSE, quality assurance, and contractor management.


Disclaimer: The selected candidate will be engaged on a contract basis through a third-party company appointed by MedcoEnergi. This role supports MedcoEnergi's projects and business objectives, and is delivered in alignment with the Company's standards, governance, and operational requirements.

title: Jindi South Jambi B - Mechanical & Rotating Engineer
raw_description:
• Perform and review the engineering design for mechanical, piping, and pipeline facilities.
  • Develop, review, and approve technical drawings and documents, including PFDs, P&IDs, Equipment Data Sheets, and Plant Layouts.
  • Review and optimize facility capacities, production rates, and material selection to ensure operational integrity.
  • Monitor, review, and oversee Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) activities to ensure compliance with project specifications, timeline, and budget.
  • Prepare, propose, and review Material Requisitions (MR) and Services Requisitions (SR) for technical alignment.
  • Generate, review, and manage comprehensive project CAPEX (Capital Expenditure) and OPEX (Operating Expenditure) estimations.
  • Propose, present, and defend programs and budget proposals to SKK Migas to secure necessary regulatory approvals.
raw_requirements:
• Bachelor or Master Degree in mechanical engineering from a reputable university.
  • Minimum 8 years of relevant experience in the oil and gas industry, specifically in facilities engineering and project management.
  • Strong expertise in Facilities Engineering and Mechanical Analysis.
  • In-depth knowledge of safety studies, including HAZOP, HAZID, and Plant Layout reviews.
  • Deep familiarity with international and local mechanical codes and standards (e.g., ASME, API, ANSI).
  • Solid understanding of project life cycles, including PIS (Project Initiation/Implementation Status) and project Close-out processes.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office, AutoCAD, and relevant Mechanical Software (e.g., Caesar II, PV Elite, HYSYS, or Pipenet).
  • Excellent communication, reporting, and presentation skills (ability to present technical and budget proposals clearly to management and regulatory bodies).
  • Strong leadership and managerial skills to coordinate project activities and supervise contractors.
  • Proficient in English (both written and spoken).
  • Fluency in Mandarin is a strong advantage.

title: GOKPL - Operation Production Engineer
raw_description:
• Lead and motivate the production team to achieve operational objectives.
  • Monitoring and controlling all hydrocarbon production and utility systems as well as ensuring that production targets are achieved.
  • Providing full logs and reports on handover for back to back basis to ensure the best flow of information and experience.

  • Initiate operational improvements through the Management of Change (MOC) process to enhance efficiency and optimize resources.

  • Minimum 12 years of experience as an Operations/Production Engineer in onshore Oil & Gas facilities.
  • Proven experience in Operation Readiness Assurance (ORA).
  • Experienced in gas plant commissioning and start-up activities.
  • Strong understanding a of hydrocarbon production operations, utility systems, and plant operations.
  • Familiar with Permit to Work (PTW), Management of Change (MOC), and API standards.

title: Campus Hiring SBY - After Sales Support Staff - PMP
raw_description:
1. Memberikan dukungan layanan purna jual (after sales support) kepada pelanggan untuk memastikan kepuasan dan keberlanjutan hubungan bisnis.

2. Menangani permintaan pelanggan terkait garansi, klaim, pemeliharaan, perbaikan, serta layanan teknis setelah proyek atau produk diserahterimakan.

3. Berkoordinasi dengan tim Engineering, Production, Quality Control, Project Management, dan Service Team dalam penyelesaian permasalahan pelanggan.

4. Memantau proses penanganan keluhan (customer complaints) dan memastikan penyelesaiannya sesuai dengan Service Level Agreement (SLA) dan standar perusahaan.

5. Menyiapkan dan mengelola dokumentasi after sales, termasuk laporan kunjungan, warranty report, service report, serta dokumentasi klaim pelanggan.

  4. Mampu melakukan monitoring dan evaluasi kinerja layanan,seperti:
    a. Complaint ratio

title: Campus Hiring SBY - Production Control Staff - PMP
raw_description:
1. Menyusun dan mengelola rencana produksi serta jadwal perbaikan kapal (ship repair schedule) berdasarkan work order, docking plan, dan target penyelesaian proyek.
  2. Berkoordinasi secara intensif dengan tim produksi, engineering, QC, dan procurement untuk memastikan material, spare part, serta sumber daya tersedia sesuai kebutuhanrepair.
  3. Menyusun daily progress report dan update schedule secara berkala untuk memastikan pekerjaan berjalan sesuai timeline yang ketat.
  4. Mengidentifikasi potensi deviasi jadwal, bottleneck, serta perubahan scope pekerjaan repair,serta menyusun rencana mitigasi untuk menjaga ketepatan delivery kapal.
  5. Mengendalikan produktivitas pekerjaan melalui monitoring manhour, machine utilization, dan efektivitas tenaga kerja selama proses ship repair berlangsung.
  6. Mendukung pelaksanaan troubleshooting dan corrective action apabila terjadi kendala teknis maupun hambatan operasional di lapangan.
  7. Memastikan seluruh aktivitas repair berjalan sesuai dengan standar keselamatan kerja(HSE), regulasi galangan, serta persyaratan klasifikasi kapal.
  8. Berkolaborasidengan Project Manager dan Owner Surveyor untuk memastikan hasil pekerjaanrepair memenuhi standar kualitas dan selesai tepat waktu.
  9. Mendukungpenerapan continuous improvement dalam proses ship repair guna meningkatkan efisiensi turnaround time dan performa operasional galangan.
raw_requirements:
1.  Pendidikan Minimal S1 dari jurusan:
    a. Teknik Industri atau bidang teknik lain yang relevan
  2. Sertifikasi tambahan terkait project planning atau supply chain menjadi nilai tambah.
  3. Pengalaman Kerja Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman di bidang: 
    a. Production Planning & Control (PPIC) 
    b. Project Planning / Scheduler 
    c. Ship Repair Operations atau Shipyard Production.
  4. Keahlian memahami proses operasional ship repair, termasuk: 
    a. Hull repair, piping, mechanical & electrical works 
    b. Blasting & painting activities
    c. Outfitting selama docking period.
  5. Menguasai konsep perencanaan dan pengendalian produksi, meliputi: 
    a. Work order management dan repair scheduling 
    b. Progress monitoring dan milestone tracking
    c. Capacity planning dan resource allocation 
    d. Mampu melakukan analisis produktivitas 
    e. Monitoring manhour dan machine utilization 
    f. Identifikasi bottleneck dan deviasi jadwal 
    g. Penyusunan mitigation plan dan corrective action 
  6. Memahami standar galangan kapal terkait: 
    a. HSE compliance dan shipyard safety regulations
    b. Persyaratan klasifikasi kapal (Class Rules) 
    c. Strong analytical skills dalam forecasting, planning, dan reporting. 
    d. Mampu menyusun daily progress report serta update schedule secara berkala. 
    e. Kemampuan koordinasi lintas fungsi dengan tim produksi, engineering, QC, procurement,serta external stakeholder (Owner Surveyor).

title: Campus Hiring SBY - PE Piping - PMP
raw_description:
1. Menyusun dan mengembangkan detail routing system perpipaan pada kapal sesuai standar dan spesifikasi teknis. 
  2. Membuat dan menyusun Work Instruction (WI) sebagai pedoman pelaksanaan pekerjaan piping. 
  3. Menghitung serta menganalisis kebutuhan manhours dan lead time pekerjaan piping. 
  4. Melakukan monitoring pelaksanaan proses serta menyusun review dan evaluasi proses secara berkala. 
  5. Mengembangkan dan meningkatkan jig/alat bantu produksi untuk mendukung efisiensi pekerjaan piping. 
  6. Melakukan problem solving terhadap kendala teknis maupun operasional di area piping.
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan minimal S1 Teknik Perkapalan / Marine Engineering atau jurusan teknik relevan lainnya. 
  2. Memahami standar industri perkapalan serta rules dan regulasi yang berlaku. 
  3. Diutamakan memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 1 tahun di bidang terkait, khususnya piping system. 
  4. Memiliki pemahaman yang baik mengenai sistem perpipaan (piping system) pada kapal.

title: Campus Hiring SBY - DE Carpenter Engineer - PMP
raw_description:
1. Menyusun dan mengembangkan detail engineering design untuk pekerjaan carpentry/interior kapal berdasarkan basic design dan spesifikasi proyek.
  2. Membuat dan mereview gambar detail interior kapal seperti cabin arrangement, furniture layout, ceiling, flooring, wall panel, dan perlengkapan interior lainnya.
  3. Menyiapkan production drawing dan installation drawing untuk kebutuhan fabrikasi dan instalasi interior kapal.
  4. Menentukan spesifikasi material carpentry seperti marine plywood, panel, insulation, flooring material, dan furniture kapal.
  5. Memastikan desain interior kapal memenuhi standar keselamatan, kenyamanan, serta regulasi klasifikasi kapal.
  6. Berkoordinasi dengan tim engineering lain seperti outfitting, piping, electrical, dan HVAC untuk memastikan integrasi desain berjalan baik.
  7. Memberikan dukungan teknis kepada tim produksi selama proses fabrikasi dan instalasi carpentry di kapal.
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan Minimal S1 Teknik Perkapalan, Teknik Mesin, Teknik Desain Interior, atau jurusan relevan.
  2. Pengalaman Minimal 1-2 tahun pengalaman di bidang carpentry engineering / ship interior design / outfitting engineering
  3. Fresh graduate dipertimbangkan untuk level junior dengan pengalaman magang atau project desain
  4. Diutamakan memiliki pengalaman di shipyard atau marine interior project.
  5. Kompetensi Teknis
    - Memahami desain interior kapal dan sistem akomodasi kapal
    - Memahami material carpentry untuk marine environment
    - Mampu membaca dan membuat gambar teknik interior dan carpentry
    - Menguasai software desain seperti: AutoCAD dan SketchUp / Rhino / 3D modelling software (nilai tambah)
    - Memahami layout furniture dan cabin arrangement
    - Memahami standar fire safety dan material requirement untuk interior kapal
    - Memahami proses fabrikasi dan instalasi interior kapal

title: Industrial Relations - UTPE
raw_description:
• Memastikan pengelolaan hubungan industrial berjalan sesuai dengan Regulasi Ketenagakerjaan, Peraturan Perusahaan/PKB, dan kebijakan internal perusahaan (IR Compliance).
  • Mengelola penanganan kasus hubungan industrial secara objektif, mulai dari pemeriksaan, investigasi, analisis fakta, dokumentasi, rekomendasi, termasuk memfasilitasi penyelesaian perselisihan hubungan industrial. (Employee Case Handling).
  • Mengelola proses pembinaan disiplin, pemberian sanksi, dan pemutusan hubungan kerja sesuai ketentuan hukum dan perusahaan yang berlaku (Dispute Resolution).
  • Mengelola hubungan yang konstruktif dengan karyawan, serikat pekerja, instansi ketenagakerjaan, dan lembaga tripartit (Employee Relations, Labour Relations, Tripartite Relations).
  • Melakukan monitoring dan pelaporan atas kondisi, tren kasus, serta risiko hubungan industrial yang terjadi dalam internal perusahaan secara korporasi.
raw_requirements:
• Pendidikan minimal S1 Hukum, Manajemen SDM, Psikologi, atau jurusan terkait.
  • Memiliki pengalaman minimal 1-2 tahun di bidang Industrial Relations/Human Capital.
  • Memahami regulasi ketenagakerjaan dan praktik hubungan industrial di Indonesia.
  • Berpengalaman menangani kasus hubungan industrial, investigasi, pembinaan disiplin, hingga penyelesaian perselisihan.
  • Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi, negosiasi, analisis, dan problem solving yang baik.
  • Mampu menyusun dokumen hubungan industrial serta mengoperasikan Microsoft Office.
  • Mampu bekerja secara objektif, menjaga kerahasiaan, dan berkoordinasi dengan berbagai stakeholder internal maupun eksternal.

title: Business Development Analyst - MODA
raw_description:
1. Melakukan analisis pasar, industri, dan pesaing untuk mengidentifikasi industri baru yang potensial serta mengeksplorasi inisiatif pengembangan bisnis baru (termasuk model masuk yang diutamakan).
  2. Menyusun laporan analitis dan rekomendasi untuk Atasan & Manajemen.
  3. Memberikan masukan mengenai tren pasar, pergerakan pesaing, dan peluang bisnis yang muncul guna mendukung proses perencanaan strategis perusahaan.
  4. Menjelajahi dan mengevaluasi model bisnis yang ada melalui analisis biaya dan manfaat.
  5. Menganalisis dan mengevaluasi kelayakan kemitraan yang ada.
  6. Mengidentifikasi mitra potensial yang selaras dengan strategi bisnis MODA.
  7. Menilai kesesuaian mitra berdasarkan kemampuan, posisi pasar, kondisi keuangan, dan keselarasan strategis.
  8. Mengkoordinasikan pendekatan awal, pengaturan pertemuan, dan komunikasi dengan mitra potensial.
  9. Menyusun materi promosi, proposal, dan presentasi untuk diskusi dengan mitra.
  10. Membangun dan memelihara hubungan dengan mitra eksternal utama, klien, dan pemangku kepentingan strategis.
  11. Mendukung keterlibatan tingkat eksekutif, negosiasi, dan diskusi kemitraan.
  12. Mengumpulkan dan memvalidasi informasi keuangan, hukum, teknis, dan operasional dari mitra potensial.
raw_requirements:
1. Minimal gelar Sarjana (S1) di bidang Akuntansi atau Teknik.
  2. Pengalaman kerja minimal 2 sampai 3 tahun, lebih disukai di bidang analisis bisnis, keuangan, atau pengembangan bisnis.
  3. Keterampilan dalam pemodelan keuangan, penilaian, dan analisis data.
  4. Mahir menggunakan Microsoft Office

title: Accounting Staff - FTI
raw_description:
1. Melakukan pencatatan, pemeriksaan, dan pemeliharaan transaksi keuangan serta data akuntansi secara akurat.
  2. Menyusun jurnal akuntansi, rekonsiliasi akun, dan dokumen pendukung lainnya.
  3. Membantu penyusunan laporan keuangan bulanan, triwulanan, dan tahunan.
  4. Memantau serta mengelola transaksi hutang dan piutang perusahaan
  5. Melakukan rekonsiliasi bank dan memastikan keakuratan data keuangan.
  6. Mendukung proses tutup buku bulanan dan tahunan.
  7. Memastikan kepatuhan terhadap standar akuntansi, kebijakan perusahaan, dan peraturan yang berlaku.
  8. Membantu proses perhitungan, pelaporan, dan administrasi perpajakan.
  9. Menyusun laporan dan analisis keuangan untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan manajemen.
  10. Berkoordinasi dengan departemen terkait dan auditor internal maupun eksternal.
  11. Menjaga kerapihan serta kelengkapan dokumentasi dan arsip keuangan perusahaan.
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan minimal S1 Akuntansi, Keuangan, atau bidang terkait.
  2. Memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 1-2 tahun di bidang Accounting, Finance, atau posisi sejenis (Fresh Graduate dipersilakan melamar).

title: Plant Maintenance Staff - FTI
raw_description:
Tanggung Jawab:

  1. Melaksanakan kegiatan preventive maintenance dan corrective maintenance terhadap mesin produksi, peralatan, serta fasilitas pendukung operasional.
  2. Melakukan inspeksi rutin untuk memastikan kondisi mesin dan peralatan dalam keadaan baik dan siap digunakan.
  3. Mengidentifikasi, menganalisis, dan melakukan perbaikan terhadap kerusakan mesin maupun peralatan operasional.
  4. Melakukan troubleshooting dan memberikan solusi atas permasalahan teknis yang terjadi di area produksi.
  5. Memastikan seluruh kegiatan perawatan dan perbaikan terdokumentasi dengan baik sesuai prosedur yang berlaku.
  6. Mencatat secara akurat aktivitas pemeliharaan, perbaikan, inspeksi, dan penggunaan suku cadang.
  7. Berkoordinasi dengan tim produksi untuk meminimalkan downtime dan memastikan kelancaran operasional.
  8. Melakukan pemantauan terhadap utilitas pabrik seperti listrik, kompresor, pompa, HVAC, genset, dan sistem pendukung lainnya.
  9. Mengusulkan kebutuhan suku cadang (spare parts) serta melakukan monitoring ketersediaannya.
  10. Memastikan seluruh pekerjaan maintenance dilakukan sesuai standar keselamatan kerja (K3) dan peraturan perusahaan.
  11. Berpartisipasi dalam kegiatan perbaikan berkelanjutan (continuous improvement) untuk meningkatkan efisiensi dan keandalan mesin.
  12. Membantu pelaksanaan instalasi, modifikasi, maupun commissioning mesin dan peralatan baru.
raw_requirements:
Kualifikasi:

  • Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 Teknik Mesin, Teknik Elektro, Teknik Mekatronika, Teknik Industri, atau bidang terkait.
  • Memiliki pengalaman minimal 1 tahun di bidang Plant Maintenance, Engineering Maintenance, atau Maintenance Technician. Lulusan baru dipersilakan untuk melamar.
  • Memiliki pengalaman di lingkungan manufaktur menjadi nilai tambah. Bersedia bekerja dalam sistem shift apabila diperlukan.


Kompetensi Teknis:

  • Memahami konsep preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance, dan predictive maintenance.
  • Memiliki kemampuan troubleshooting mesin dan peralatan produksi.
  • Memahami sistem mekanikal, elektrikal, pneumatik, dan hidrolik.
  • Mampu membaca gambar teknik, wiring diagram, atau schematic drawing.
  • Memahami penggunaan alat ukur dan alat kerja maintenance.
  • Memiliki pengetahuan terkait utilitas pabrik seperti:
    • Sistem kelistrikan
    • Air compressor
  • Familiar dengan sistem CMMS (Computerized Maintenance Management System) atau ERP Maintenance menjadi nilai tambah.

title: Wards Nurse - HRT
organization_name: PT Jakarta Pakar Kardia (Heartology Cardiovascular Hospital)
raw_description:
1. Memberikan asuhan keperawatan secara komprehensif kepada pasien rawat inap sesuai standar profesi, standar pelayanan rumah sakit, dan prinsip keselamatan pasien
  2. Melakukan pengkajian, pemantauan, dan evaluasi kondisi pasien secara berkala, termasuk tanda-tanda vital, kondisi kardiovaskular, serta respons terhadap terapi yang diberikan serta melaporkan kepada Dokter yang bertugas
  3. Melakukan tindakan keperawatan dan pemberian obat sesuai instruksi dokter sesuai prinsip keselamatan pasien
  4. Membantu dokter dalam pemeriksaan, tindakan medis, dan prosedur diagnostik yang diperlukan
  5. Mengoperasikan dan memantau penggunaan alat kesehatan yang digunakan dalam perawatan pasien, termasuk alat monitoring jantung dan peralatan medis lainnya
  6. Memberikan edukasi kepada pasien dan keluarga mengenai kondisi kesehatan, pengobatan, perawatan lanjutan, pola hidup sehat, serta persiapan pulang (discharge planning)
  7. Melakukan dokumentasi asuhan keperawatan secara lengkap, akurat, dan tepat waktu pada rekam medis maupun Sistem Informasi Manajemen Rumah Sakit (SIMRS)
  8. Berkolaborasi dengan dokter, apoteker, ahli gizi, dan tenaga kesehatan lainnya untuk memastikan pelayanan pasien berjalan optimal
  9. Menjaga kenyamanan, keamanan, privasi, dan kerahasiaan informasi pasien selama menjalani perawatan di rumah sakit
  10. Memastikan kesiapan sarana, prasarana, serta ketersediaan alat dan bahan medis yang diperlukan untuk pelayanan pasien di unit rawat inap.
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan Wajib Profesi Ners
  2. Memiliki STR Aktif
  3. Memiliki Pengetahuan lebih perawatan maupun obat-obatan pasien kardiovaskuler
  4. Memiliki pengalaman kerja sebagai perawat rawat inap pasien jantung dan pembuluh darah lebih diutamakan minimal 2 tahun
  5. Mampu bekerja secara sistem shift dan full time
  6. Mampu melakukan pemasangan infus
  7. Teliti, disiplin, bertanggung jawab, serta mampu bekerja secara individu maupun dalam tim.

title: Asisten Apoteker - HRT

raw_description:
1. Membantu Apoteker dalam menyiapkan Alkes, obat, meracik obat-obatan serta mengedukasi pasien tentang cara penggunaanya dengan prinsip 5 benar

title: Business Development Analyst
raw_description:
• Membangun dan membina relasi yang baik dengan pihak internal dan eksternal untuk mendapatkan informasi-informasi yang dibutuhkan dalam kegiatan pengembangan bisnis.
  • Mengumpulkan, mendokumentasikan, dan mengupdate berbagai informasi terkait kondisi pasar (mikro/makro) termasuk trend kedepan yang akan terjadi secara global.
  • Menganalisis knowledge management database dan mengumpulkan informasi peluang proyek.
  • Mengumpulkan data primer/sekunder terkait proyek yang akan diapproach oleh perusahaan serta membuat base assumption.
  • Mengikuti kegiatan tender akuisisi yang diselenggarakan oleh stakeholders terkait serta menindaklanjuti hasil analisis preliminary due diligence bersama
  • Melakukan analisis pada existing business Grup Astra Infra dan meninjau business opportunity berdasarkan industry landscape dan kaitannya dengan existing business Grup Astra Infra.
raw_requirements:
• Minimal Lulusan S1 Manajemen Keuangan / Manajemen Bisnis / Teknik.
  • Memiliki minimal 1-2 tahun pengalaman di bidang Business Development dan area yang berkaitan seperti Project Management, Strategic Planning & Management System.
  • Proficient in Microsoft 365
  • Memiliki kemampuan Bahasa Inggris yang baik (spoken & written).
  • Memiliki kemampuan analytical thinking, communication, teamwork & networking yang baik.
  • Memiliki minat yang tinggi pada industri investasi dan infrastruktur.



Disclaimer: 

Semua aplikasi akan diproses melalui website Astra Career. Aplikasi yang masuk secara manual melalui email Astra Infra Careers tidak akan diproses.

Hanya kandidat yang lolos ke tahap selanjutnya yang akan mendapat notifikasi atau undangan.


Untuk informasi lebih lanjut mengenai proses rekrutmen posisi ini dapat menghubungi Astra Infra Recruitment Team (careers@astrainfra.co.id).

title: PPC Officer - UTPE
raw_description:
• Melakukan analisis dan merancang rencana produksi harian, mingguan, dan bulanan berdasarkan permintaan customer, kapasitas produksi, dan biaya yang dibutuhkan
  • Memantau proses pembelian material dan produksi di lapangan untuk memastikan kesesuaian dengan jadwal dan standar mutu
  • Memverifikasi dan mengontrol biaya kebutuhan material dan biaya produksi
raw_requirements:
• Pendidikan minimal D3 Teknik Industri atau Manajemen
  • IPK minimal 3.00
  • Memiliki pemahaman dasar mengenai production planning, scheduling, dan inventory control menjadi nilai tambah
  • Mampu mengolah dan menganalisis data dengan baik
  • Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dan koordinasi yang baik
  • Bersedia ditempatkan di seluruh area operasional perusahaan (Balikpapan dan Jakarta)

major.reason: Sangat Cocok! Pekerjaan ini secara eksplisit mencari lulusan Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, atau bidang IT/Komputer.

gpa.reason: Sesuai. IPK minimal yang diminta adalah 3.00, sedangkan IPK Anda adalah 3.39.

toefl.reason: Sesuai. Tidak ada syarat nilai TOEFL tertulis secara spesifik.

gender.reason: Sesuai. Lowongan terbuka untuk Pria dan Wanita.

experience.reason: Cocok. Sangat Relevan! Lowongan ini berkaitan dengan sektor operasional hulu migas, di mana Anda memiliki pengalaman magang di Pertamina Hulu Rokan.

exp_years.reason: Sesuai. Terbuka untuk Fresh Graduate / pengalaman ≤ 1 tahun.

title: Engineer on Site (Teknisi IT) - Seluruh Indonesia
raw_description:
• Pendidikan minimal SMK Jurusan Elektro atau Informatika, atau D3/D4/S1 Jurusan Teknik Informatika. Untuk lulusan SMK wajib memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 1 (satu) tahun pada bidang yang relevan, sedangkan lulusan D3/D4/S1 dipersilakan melamar sebagai fresh graduate. Kandidat yang memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 1 (satu) tahun pada bidang yang relevan akan menjadi nilai tambah.
  • Memiliki pengetahuan terkait trouble shooting Network, Lan atau sejenisnya yang berkaitan dengan jaringan.
  • Wajib memiliki SIM C yang masih berlaku.
  • Wajib memiliki smartphone berbasis Android untuk mendukung pelaksanaan pekerjaan.
  • Wajib mencantumkan kota tempat tinggal saat ini pada CV yang dilampirkan.
  • Bersedia ditempatkan di lokasi kerja yang ditentukan 
  • Bersedia bekerja sebagai Tenaga Alih Daya (TAD)

title: Sr Officer-TLP Leased Java
raw_description:
Job Description

The Senior Officer for TLP Leased is a critical role responsible for the comprehensive management of third-party tower and fiber lease providers. This position ensures that all external partners meet their contractual obligations, performance KPIs, and service level agreements. The role involves strategic oversight, performance analysis, and hands-on coordination for site-related activities, including relocations and equipment dismantling. You will act as a key liaison between internal technology divisions and external partners, driving governance and ensuring all operations contribute effectively to the company's strategic goals.

 

Key Responsibilities:

  • Ensure services provided by TLP and FLP partners adhere to agreed-upon contracts.

  • Review, monitor, and report on the performance of TLP and FLP partners to management.

  • Conduct trouble ticket (TT) reconciliation with TLP and FLP partners.

  • Coordinate with internal and external parties for site relocations and the dismantling of equipment.

  • Manage and monitor interactions with all external parties related to IOH, ensuring smooth collaboration.

  • Establish and lead governance and reconciliation meetings with TLP and FLP partners.

  • Translate company strategy into a divisional work plan, establish KPIs, and manage the team budget.

  • Manage and track Service Level Agreements (SLA)/KPIs for the Managed Service Team as per contractual agreements.

 

 

Qualification

Qualification:

Minimum Bachelor's Degree in Telecom / IT / Industrial Engineering.5-10 years expert role in the areas of telecommunication industries.

Strong ability to interact, communicate, present and influence within multiple levels of the organization.

Strategic thinker with ability to understand Network Improvement strategy,

Strong analytical skills.

Ability to manage multiple competing priorities simultaneously to meet tight deadlines and drive activity projects to completion.

Eagerness to accept increased responsibility and self-motivated.

Strong drive for execution and delivering results.

Highly committed to quality and timely result of the works.

Ability to manage vendor manage service.

Strong in vendor management.

Good Communication (speaking & writing) in English.

 

Experience:

3 years of experiences in telecommunication industries.

3 years of experiences in TLP - 3rd Party Management.

 

Skills:

Expert in TLP - 3rd Party Management

Expert in Tower & Fiber Optic Lease Provider.

Expert in Vendor Management and Managed Services Governance

Expert in Risk Management

Good Knowledge in RAN & Transport Technology

title: AVP-Business Development
raw_description:
Job Details

Overview

Responsible for driving business solutioning growth within his/her vertical industry by enabling them to drive business growth, build strong partnerships, and contribute to the overall success of the organization. They specialized develop a network of contacts to attract clients, research new market opportunities and oversee growth projects, making sales projections and forecasting revenue, in line with projected income.

Requirements

Qualification:

  • Bachelor in Business Administration, Management, Marketing, Industrial Engineering, Informatics System or a related field. An MBA or relevant master’s degree can be advantageous.
  • Certifications in project management and business analysis are preferred.
  • Specialized knowledge in specific vertical industry, such as: Financial Services, Supply Chain, Government, and Energy

Experience

  • Work experienced as Account Manager, Business Development, Business Analyst, Product Manager in Solution Services or from reputable consulting service in Technology
  • Work experienced within vertical industry as employee min 5 years

Skills

  • Has broad relationship to private sectors or Government
  • Updated technology trends, especially in ICT Business
  • Experienced in project delivery
  • Multitasking tasking solved
  • Able to drives revenue growth (result oriented) while ensuring seamless collaborations

Responsibilities

  • Lead generation & account planning : Account Planning, industrial expert based on technology trends, fact Findings from client pain points and insight info, triggering new business initiatives with clients, orchestrating client requirements and internal capabilities
  • Solution design & architecture (RFPs): Defining clear problem statement based on customer’s pain points/ needs, solutioning driven by recommending solution best practices and involving the required pre-sales experts based on customer needs, joint planning sessions for lead sharing and pursuing integrated opportunities
  • Commercial proposal (RFQs): Responsible for putting together the client proposal (solution design, pricing, etc.), boxed solutions to be priced based on a predefined price list, bespoke services to be priced by Business Development and Solution Architect
  • Client negotiation: present the solution to the customers and negotiate contract (with help from other functions as needed), responsible for contract signing & booking
  • Service delivery: as part of steering committee, to align between delivery and plan
  • Renewals: involved reviewing on renewals

title: Officer-B2B Transportation & Logistic Solution
raw_description:
Job Details

Role Purpose:

Responsible for providing expert technical consultancy, designing robust solutions, developing compelling proposals, and performing business calculations for our suite of services. This includes Core Services (Internet, Connectivity, Fixed Phone, B2B Mobile) and advanced ICT services (IoT, Big Data, Security, Data Center & Cloud, System Integration). You will be a key technical partner to the sales team, helping to secure new business and ensure the solutions proposed are both technically sound and commercially viable.

 

Key Responsibilities:

  • Technical Consultation: Collaborate with the sales team to assess customer technical requirements and challenges.
  • Solution Design: Architect and design valid and implementable technical solutions that meet customer needs, utilizing a mix of Core and ICT services.
  • Business Analysis: Develop business cases and financial models to ensure the feasibility and profitability of proposed solutions.
  • Proposal Development: Create detailed technical documentation and presentations for sales proposals.
  • Project Handoff: Ensure a smooth transition of the designed solution to the service delivery team for implementation.
  • Collaboration: Work closely with internal teams (Product, Sales, Service Delivery) and external partners to deliver complex projects and respond to tenders.

 

Key Activities:

  • Asses the customer requirement
  • Do on desk survey to map with customer requirement
  • Create effective solution design with accurate technical requirement
  • Create business analysis as a reference for Sales team offer to the customer
  • Assist Sales team to present to the customer
  • Execute the project to be implemented by Service Delivery team.
  • Execute and achieve functional goals given by managers
  • Work co-operatively with other team members to accomplished delegated tasks assigned by managers
  • Provide support, when appropriate, for the team in cases of absence or unavailability
  • Provide continuous inputs on business process and systems improvement
  • Ensuring the delegated tasks are completed in timely and efficient manner
  • Team Up with respective Sales Division, and co-ordinate with other function within Indosat,
  • Collaboration with external parties (partners, vendors) to grab Big or Complex Project/Tender

Requirements

 

Qualification:

  • University graduate, in field of Telecommunication or Information Engineering with min 2 years experiences in Telco Operation/Planning/Project or Presales function.
  • Able to work under limited direction and use initiative and judgment
  • Flexible and adaptable in under pressure situations and meet short and long-term deadlines
  • Good in analytical and planning skill to translate customer requirement into matching product & solution

 

Skill & Competence:

  • Able to design and configure the Core & ICT Services
  • Able to run and manage the project in term of enterprise service

 

Business Acumen:

  • Understand and know the Market Segment of Enterprise Service
  • Understand the concept of basic business calculations, financial posture and investment analysis
  • Preferably has good understanding on logistics and supply chain industry landscape

 

Communication Skill:

  • Has a good communication skill in Bahasa and English
  • Has a good presentation skill
  • Fluent in English, having sound verbal and written communication, strong negotiation presentation and report writing skills

 

Certification:

Preferably candidate with below certifications is highly desirable:

  • Networking: Cisco (CCNA/CCNP) or equals (Huawei, Juniper etc)
  • Cloud: GCP Certified or equals AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert
  • Security: NSE Certification, CISSP or equals
  • AI Certification: AWS AI Practitioner, Certified Cloud AI Solutions Architect (CCASA) or equals

title: Officer-Platinum Helpdesk
raw_description:
Role Purpose

  • Manage the team to do level-0 troubleshooting and escalate the problem by trouble ticketing system (problem identification)
  • Support for L1 Corporate MIDI Services Fault Localization and Handling any technical problem to internal Customer for Corporates Services (investigations, analysis, and problem solver)
  • To make sure the services provided to the customers meet the SLA committed in the contract (monitoring MTTR and Long outage Reduction).
  • Provide data for improvement actions on recurring incidents or requested by customers to increase after-sales service of Indosat’s corporate customer.

Job Details

  1. Operational Function
  • Performing handling complaint resolution from corporate customer (especially handled by EOS) related to service degradation and or service interruption.
  • Collecting and analyzing cases of resolution work which have complained by customers and make a decision and solution related to Indosat Ooredoo connectivity problem.
  • Coordination, escalation and follow-up tickets within Internal and External (3rd party) based on MTTR standard.
  • Supervise team properly to help its customer network complaint resolution.
  • Supervise long outage analyzation to find out the way to accelerate the recovery work.
  • Provide the Detail Handling Process History as requested by Related Team.
  • Meeting with Customer and Related Team as part of Indosat Corporate Problem Resolution
  1. Improvement activities
  • Providing data and Follow UP to QI and SM Team for improvement actions on recurring incidents  or requested by customers to increase after sales service of MIDI customer,
  1. Team Management
  • Monitor and evaluate the performance of vendors or outtask to have the best supporting team. Support project monitoring implementation that impact for Corporate customer
  • Responsible for team [agents] improvement hard skill and soft skill which is required by customer.

 

Qualification:

  • Background in Telecommunication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology Engineering (minimum Bachelor degree).
  • Certification on certain area (CCNA, expert of system, etc.) will be an advantage.

Experience:

  • Minimum 2-year experience in telecommunication system.
  • Wide understanding on telecommunication systems.
  • Good knowledge on quality and assurance process in telecommunication industry.
  • Understand business process within related functions.
  • Good understanding of project management
  • Some years experiences on telecommunication system operation will be useful.

Skill :

Role Purpose

  • Manage the team to do level-0 troubleshooting and escalate the problem by trouble ticketing system (problem identification)
  • Support for L1 Corporate MIDI Services Fault Localization and Handling any technical problem to internal Customer for Corporates Services (investigations, analysis, and problem solver)
  • To make sure the services provided to the customers meet the SLA committed in the contract (monitoring MTTR and Long outage Reduction).
  • Provide data for improvement actions on recurring incidents or requested by customers to increase after-sales service of Indosat’s corporate customer.

Job Details

  1. Operational Function
  • Performing handling complaint resolution from corporate customer (especially handled by EOS) related to service degradation and or service interruption.
  • Collecting and analyzing cases of resolution work which have complained by customers and make a decision and solution related to Indosat Ooredoo connectivity problem.
  • Coordination, escalation and follow-up tickets within Internal and External (3rd party) based on MTTR standard.
  • Supervise team properly to help its customer network complaint resolution.
  • Supervise long outage analyzation to find out the way to accelerate the recovery work.
  • Provide the Detail Handling Process History as requested by Related Team.
  • Meeting with Customer and Related Team as part of Indosat Corporate Problem Resolution
  1. Improvement activities
  • Providing data and Follow UP to QI and SM Team for improvement actions on recurring incidents  or requested by customers to increase after sales service of MIDI customer,
  1. Team Management
  • Monitor and evaluate the performance of vendors or outtask to have the best supporting team. Support project monitoring implementation that impact for Corporate customer
  • Responsible for team [agents] improvement hard skill and soft skill which is required by customer.

 

Qualification:

  • Background in Telecommunication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology Engineering (minimum Bachelor degree).
  • Certification on certain area (CCNA, expert of system, etc.) will be an advantage.

Experience:

  • Minimum 2-year experience in telecommunication system.
  • Wide understanding on telecommunication systems.
  • Good knowledge on quality and assurance process in telecommunication industry.
  • Understand business process within related functions.
  • Good understanding of project management
  • Some years experiences on telecommunication system operation will be useful.

Skill :

  • Good communication skills.
  • Good written and oral communication skills.
  • Strong analytical capability and skills.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office application.
  • Proficient in English.

Behavior Competency:

  • Translating strategy into action
  • Accelerate business and customer.
  • Decisiveness
  • Cultivate networks & partnerships.
  • Making a difference
  • Learning agility

title: Sr Officer-Enterprise Solution IOT
raw_description:
Job Details

Area of Responsibilities:

  • Perform presentations and demonstrations of solutions to potential and external clients. Support sales for meeting with customers.
  • Analyze clients' business and industry needs and propose solutions accordingly. Make a detailed and accurate analysis of business needs.
  • Provide technical support and consulting to clients and internal teams. Collaborating with external parties, vendors, and industry partners, to provide optimal solutions.
  • Monitor solution performance and make improvements according to client requirements. Generate & Monitor solution performance reports.
  • Increase industry knowledge and new technology to improve the solutions' quality. Competent and up-to-date industry knowledge.

 

Job:

  1. Understand customer needs and present Appropriate solutions From our product catalog
  2. Provide technical suport and consulting to clients and internal teams.
  3. Manage projects and coordinate with partners & technical teams to implement solutions.
  4. Monitor solution performance and make improvements according to client requirements.
  5. Support the development and implementation of marketing strategies.
  6. Increase industry knowledge and new technology to build future-proof solutions
  7. Provide market feedback to the product teams to ensure our solutions remain relevant
  8. Create, implement & report budgets and cost plans for managed projects.


Qualification:

  • Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree in business management in IT/Engineering or Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Informatics, and other related disciplines.

Related Experience:

  • At least 5 years of experience in a relevant portfolio.
  • Subject matter expertise in IoT and strong telecoms technical understanding.
  • Highly preferred coming from IT Services, IT Consultant, and System Integrator.
  • Being experienced in the Product and Presales team is a plus.

Skills:

  • Understanding of the IoT market: Familiarity with the current state of the IoT market and the various IoT solutions and technologies available, as well as an understanding of the key trends and developments in the space.
  • Business acumen: The ability to understand potential customers' business challenges and goals and translate those challenges into specific IoT solutions that can help the customer achieve their goals.
  • Technical expertise: A good understanding of the technical aspects of IoT solutions, including the devices, sensors, networking protocols, and software used in IoT solutions.
  • Communication skills: Strong presentation, negotiation, and communication skills are essential for effectively communicating the value of an IoT solution to potential customers.
  • Solution design: Understanding of IoT system design, integration, and deployment.
  • Proposal writing: Experience in writing proposals and responding to RFPs and RFIs.
  • Project management: Understanding project management methodologies and tools
  • Understanding of ROI and TCO calculations
  • Familiarity with IoT solution sales cycles, pricing models, and contract negotiation.

title: AVP-Core Performance
raw_description:
Role Purpose

Ensuring the performance of core network (KPI & KQI) at the best performance level.

Establishing and maintaining performance frameworks and using this to drive the core network improvements.

Maintaining the customer experience index by delivering the best core network performance, including but not limited to top apps latency & packet loss, crowd sourcing platform report, and service operation related activity.

 

Job Description

 

Key Performance and Key Quality Indicators

-    Understanding the key elements of KPI and KQI of CS and PS Core Nodes,
-    Performing analysis on the root cause as well as the solution of any performance degradations,
-    Capacity utilization assessment and strategic improvement plan.

 

Core Network Performance Optimization

-    Analysis and optimization of Core Network parameters,
-    Proposal initiatives to improve the network performance, considering the business and commercial aspects

 

Core Network Reporting

-    Routine monitoring for core network performance and provide insights to the correlated functions, 
-    Data assessment to support commercial or business team requirement.

 

Customer Satisfaction Contribution

-    Establish strategic plan to improve the network performance which contribute to customer experience index

 

Qualification:
-    Min bachelor’s degree in Information Technology

Experience:
-    6 to 12 years of relevant experience in CS and PS Core nodes,

Skills:
-    Knowledge of Data Core Networks (2G, 3G, 4G, VoLTE)
-    Application of statistical analysis within performance
-    Understanding of CS and PS Core networks and associated technologies
-    2G/3G/4G end to end design elements

  1.

title: AVP-Radio Performance (Non Java)
raw_description:
Role Purpose

-    Responsible to define, develop, and review to continuously improving in the operation of cellular and corporate network to manage network service within a defined SLA.
-    Lead optimization to maintain/improve customer experience within defined KPI.
-    Responsible to keep up with global trends and technology update, understand business direction and develop principles and selection method accordingly for the most suitable partner and technology.
-    Responsible to support Regulatory and Kominfo data requirement and test case 
-    Responsible to manage and support pre and post project activity within the target KPI to be agreed

 

Job Descriptiom

 

Domain

Manage RAN optimization

Solution Development

-    define and provide principles and selection method accordingly for the most suitable operational aspect.
-    detailing operational aspect related to RAN optimizations 

 

Radio optimization area

-    responsible regional network quality KPI.
-    coordinate all clusters in regional and distribute network quality KPI target each cluster. 
-    monitor, evaluate & execute method to get effective process, make recommendations to Superior and implement actions, such as improvement tools, additional resources, etc

 

Management

-    Manage team include MS and Project team
-    Coordinate with regulatory, Sales, Project, and Planning

Qualification:
-    Min bachelor’s degree with major study in Electrical / Telecommunication Engineering / Information System

Experience:
-    Minimum 5 years’ experience in Telecommunication industry, especially cellular operational solution
-    Has a good experience in cellular optimizations is advantage.
-    Experience in leading on any telecommunication project

Skills:
-    Good leadership capability.
-    Good communication in both Bahasa Indonesia and English.
-    Good technical writing and reporting.
-    Good presentation and persuasion skill capabilities.
-    Good knowledge of telecommunication business in general and Understanding RAN 2G/3G/4G/5G
-    Good understanding in general and specific business process within the business users
-    Customer focus
-    Good in teamwork

title: PPIC Supervisor
location: Kawasan Industri Manis, Jalan Manis Kiri Nomor 3-4, Manis Jaya, Kecamatan Jatiuwung, Kota Tangerang, - Tangerang
raw_description:
Responsibilities:

  1. Plan, propose, coordinate, and analyze inventory and production targets, short-term capacity planning, material purchase estimates, activity plans for each production line, and mill capacity utilization to ensure accurate and timely production planning.
  2. Plan, coordinate, and monitor product and production support material availability to ensure timely availability and quantity.
  3. Prepare reports on production activities, product and material availability levels, and trends to serve as benchmarks agreed upon by management to ensure accurate production reports are provided periodically.
  4. Plan, implement, and evaluate the development of processes and procedures in the inventory and production departments by submitting ideas for improving work quality or providing necessary analytical documentation in accordance with the Management System & Quality, to ensure consistent and sustainable quality improvements.
raw_requirements:
Required Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree in Industrial Engineering with a minimum GPA of 2.80 on a 4.00 scale.
  • Minimum of 2 years' experience in inventory and production planning.
  • Attention to quality and orderliness, service orientation, communication, planning and organization, problem-solving and decision-making, and analytical thinking.
  • Knowledge of existing infrastructure, estimation and forecasting, warehouse management, and milling and production processes.
  • Understanding of product planning (manufacturing) and quality systems and material availability that impact production implementation.

title: Jindi South Jambi B - QA/QC & HSE Engineer
raw_description:
• Perform, coordinate, and oversee QA/QC activities for all oil and gas facility projects to ensure compliance with company standards and industry regulations.
  • Review, evaluate, and approve quality procedures, technical specifications, Inspection and Test Plans (ITP), and material data sheets.
  • Lead and coordinate witness testing, including FAT (Factory Acceptance Testing), SAT (Site Acceptance Testing), and other non-destructive/destructive testing methods.
  • Coordinate and manage third-party inspections, equipment certifications, and regulatory examinations.
  • Implement, monitor, and coordinate HSE programs, procedures, and safety management systems across facility projects.
  • Support project completion stages, ensuring all quality and safety documentation is compliant for PIS (Project Initiation/Implementation Status) and project Close-out processes.
raw_requirements:
• Bachelor or Master Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Metallurgical/Material Engineering, or a related technical discipline from a reputable university.
  • Minimum 8 years of relevant experience in the oil and gas industry, with a strong focus on QA/QC and HSE functions in facility projects.
  • Deep understanding of company QA/QC specifications, inspection procedures, and Oil & Gas HSE standards & procedures.
  • In-depth knowledge of international codes and standards for pressure vessels, piping, pipelines, rotating equipment, and static equipment (e.g., ASME, API, AWS, ISO).
  • Thorough knowledge of Indonesian Migas certification regulations, statutory inspection processes, and government compliance requirements.
  • Familiarity with safety and risk assessment studies, including HAZOP and HAZID.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office (and relevant QA/QC or HSE reporting software).
  • Excellent communication, reporting, and presentation skills (ability to present audit findings, quality reports, and safety statistics clearly to management and auditors).
  • Strong leadership and managerial skills to drive safety culture and quality compliance across contractor teams.
  • Proficient in English (both written and spoken).
  • Fluency in Mandarin is a strong advantage.

title: Jindi South Jambi B - Civil & Structural Engineer
raw_description:
• Perform, review, and approve the engineering design, structural analysis, and cost estimations for civil and structural facilities.
  • Review and optimize material selection (such as concrete, steel, and coating specifications) to ensure structural integrity and long-term durability.
  • Review technical drawings, site layouts, and foundation designs to ensure alignment with project requirements.
  • Monitor, review, and oversee Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) activities for all civil and structural scopes to ensure compliance with schedule, safety, and quality standards.
  • Prepare, propose, monitor, and review Material Requisitions (MR) and Services Requisitions (SR) for civil/structural packages.
  • Compile, monitor, and report regularly on civil project progress, program activities, and milestones.
  • Generate, review, control, and manage comprehensive project CAPEX (Capital Expenditure) and OPEX (Operating Expenditure) estimations for civil scopes.
  • Propose, present, and defend civil/structural work programs and budget proposals to SKK Migas and Partners to secure necessary approvals.
raw_requirements:
• Bachelor or Master Degree in Civil Engineering, Structural Engineering or Ocean Engineering  from a reputable university.
  • Minimum 8 years of relevant experience in the oil and gas industry, specifically in civil infrastructure and structural engineering for facilities.
  • Strong expertise in Structural Analysis (onshore/offshore structures, foundations, pipe racks) and Facilities Engineering.
  • In-depth knowledge of safety and design studies, including HAZOP, HAZID, and Plant Layout reviews.
  • Solid understanding of project life cycles, including PIS (Project Initiation/Implementation Status) and project Close-out processes.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office and relevant civil/structural engineering software (e.g., SACS, STAAD Pro, SAP2000, or AutoCAD).
  • Excellent communication, reporting, and presentation skills (ability to present technical data and budget proposals clearly to management, partners, and regulatory bodies).
  • Strong leadership and managerial skills to coordinate project activities and supervise contractors.
  • Proficient in English (both written and spoken).
  • Fluency in Mandarin is a strong advantage.

title: Jindi South Jambi B - Electrical, Instrument & Telecommunication Engineer
raw_description:
• Perform and review the engineering design for electrical, instrument, and telecommunication facilities.
  • Develop, review, and approve technical drawings and documents, including PFDs, P&IDs, System Architecture, Single Line Diagrams (SLD), and Equipment Data Sheets.
  • Review vendor and contractor engineering documents, drawings, and technical queries to ensure compliance with project specifications.
  • Monitor, review, and oversee Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) activities for all EIT scopes to ensure alignment with timeline and quality standards.
  • Prepare, propose, and review Material Requisitions (MR) and Services Requisitions (SR) for EIT packages.
  • Propose, present, and defend EIT programs and budget proposals to SKK Migas to secure necessary regulatory approvals.
raw_requirements:
• Bachelor or Master Degree in Electrical Engineering or Physics Engineering from a reputable university.
  • Minimum 8 years of relevant experience in the oil and gas industry, specifically in Electrical, Instrument, and Telecommunication (EIT) systems.
  • Strong expertise in EIT Analysis, system design, and network architecture.
  • In-depth knowledge of safety studies, including HAZOP, HAZID, and safety-instrumented systems.
  • Deep familiarity with international and local EIT codes and standards (e.g., IEC, IEEE, ISA, API).
  • Solid understanding of project life cycles, including PIS (Project Initiation/Implementation Status) and project Close-out processes.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office and AutoCAD (familiarity with specialized engineering software is an advantage).
  • Excellent communication, reporting, and presentation skills (ability to present technical data clearly to management and stakeholders).
  • Strong leadership and managerial skills to oversee contractors and project teams.
  • Proficient in English (both written and spoken).
  • Fluency in Mandarin is a strong advantage.

title: Campus Hiring SBY - Technical Support Officer - PMP
raw_description:
1. Menerima dan mencatat pengajuan klaim garansi dari pelanggan.
  2. Verifikasi status garansi unit.
  3. Control Investigation and Technical Analysis.
  4. Control Checking Unit and Closing Job (Final Check and Deliver Unit)
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan Minimal S1 dari jurusan: 
    a. Teknik Perkapalan / Naval Architecture 
    b. Teknik Mesin 
    c. Teknik Industri atau bidang teknik lain yang relevan.
  2. Pengalaman Kerja Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman di bidang: 
    a. Technical Support / After Sales Service 
    b. Warranty Claim Handling 
    c. Quality Control atau Technical Inspection 
    d. Industri shipbuilding, shipyard, manufaktur berat, atau engineering project.
  3. Pengalaman dalam menangani investigasi teknis dan proses klaimgaransi menjadi nilai tambah.
  4. Keahlian: Memahami proses layanan purna jual khususnya:
    a. Warranty claim management 
    b. Prosedur verifikasi status garansi unit 
    c. Alur investigasi dan penyelesaian klaim pelanggan.
  5. Mampu melakukan kontrol terhadap: 
    a. Investigation process dan technical root cause analysis 
    b. Pemeriksaan kondisi unit serta evaluasi perbaikan 
    c. Final inspection dan closing job sebelum unit diserahkan kembali kepelanggan.
  6. Familiar dengan dokumentasi teknis seperti: 
    a. Service report, inspection checklist, warranty documentation 
    b. Technical troubleshooting dan corrective action process

title: Campus Hiring SBY - Prototyping & Testing Engineer - UTPE
raw_description:
• Merencanakan dan melaksanakan proses pembuatan unit prototype untuk produk yang sedang dikembangkan.
  • Menangani proses prototyping secara end-to-end, meliputi perakitan, modifikasi, penyempurnaan, hingga kesiapan uji.
  • Merancang dan menyediakan alat bantu/jig/fixture yang dibutuhkan dalam proses prototyping dan testing.
  • Melaksanakan proses testing terhadap prototype, komponen, dan material hasil research untuk memastikan kesesuaian dengan standar dan spesifikasi yang ditetapkan.
  • Menganalisis hasil pengujian, mengidentifikasi potensi risiko atau kegagalan, serta memberikan rekomendasi perbaikan desain.
  • Menyusun dokumentasi teknis terkait proses prototyping dan testing.
raw_requirements:
• Pendidikan minimal S1 Teknik Mesin.
  • Memiliki pemahaman proses prototyping, perakitan, dan pengujian produk (fresh graduate dipersilakan dengan pengalaman magang relevan).
  • Mampu membaca gambar teknik dan memahami spesifikasi produk.
  • Memiliki kemampuan analisis masalah dan komunikasi yang baik.
  • Bersedia bekerja di area workshop/lab dan mengikuti dinamika project.

title: Campus Hiring SBY - PDC Maritime Instructor - PMP
raw_description:
1. Merancang dan menyampaikan program pelatihan teknis maritim yang interaktif dan berbasis standar kompetensi.
  2. Memfasilitasi pembelajaran melalui metode kelas, simulasi, dan praktik langsung di workshop. 
  3. Mengimplementasikan kurikulum pelatihan yang terstruktur dan selaras dengan kebutuhan operasional. 
  4. Meninjau, memperbarui, dan menyempurnakan modul pelatihan secara berkelanjutan. 
  5. Mengembangkan materi pembelajaran yang relevan dengan perkembangan teknologi maritim. 
  6. Memantau perkembangan peserta selama proses pembelajaran di kelas maupun On the Job Training (OJT). 
  7. Mengevaluasi performa teknis dan kompetensi perilaku secara sistematis. 
  8. Melaksanakan asesmen kompetensi untuk mengukur tingkat keterampilan dan pemahaman peserta. 
  9. Mengidentifikasi kesenjangan kompetensi dan menyusun rencana perbaikan terarah. 
  10. Memvalidasi kesiapan peserta sebelum ditempatkan dalam operasional. 
  11. Menegakkan standar keselamatan dan regulasi industri maritim dalam seluruh aktivitas pelatihan. 
  12. Menanamkan budaya keselamatan sebagai bagian integral dari proses pembelajaran.
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan:
    - Diploma di bidang Arsitektur Kapal, Teknik Kelautan, Teknik Mesin, atau bidang maritim terkait. 
    - Sertifikasi dalam pelatihan atau teknik instruksional menjadi nilai tambah (misalnya Train the Trainer, Instructional Design).
  2. Pengalaman Kerja:
    - Minimal 1-2 tahun pengalaman di industri maritim (shipbuilding, ship repair, atau operasi maritim). 
    - Pengalaman sebelumnya sebagai trainer, instruktur, atau mentor sangat diutamakan. 
    - Memiliki pengalaman langsung (hands-on) dengan peralatan maritim, mesin, dan proses operasional.
  3. Keterampilan Teknis:   
    - Memiliki pengetahuan teknis yang kuat dalam shipbuilding, ship repair, atau operasi maritim. 
    - Mahir merencanakan dan melaksanakan program pelatihan (kelas & OJT). 
    - Kompeten dalam menggunakan alat bantu pelatihan, simulator, dan peralatan workshop. 
    - Mampu melakukan asesmen kompetensi dan evaluasi performa secara terstruktur.
  4. Keterampilan Perilaku & Soft Skills:    
    - Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dan interpersonal yang sangat baik. 
    - Berpikir analitis dan memiliki kemampuan pemecahan masalah yang baik. 
    - Memiliki mindset keselamatan yang kuat dan komitmen terhadap kepatuhan operasional. 
    - Mampu menyesuaikan metode pengajaran dengan berbagai gaya belajar dan tingkat kemampuan peserta.

title: Supervisor Billing & Warehouse - GM
raw_description:

  2. Memiliki pengalaman minimal 3 tahun di bidang Billing, Warehouse, Logistics, atau Inventory Control, dengan pengalaman memimpin tim menjadi nilai tambah.
  3. Diutamakan menguasai SAP dan mampu melakukan monitoring serta reporting operasional.
  4. Mahir menggunakan Microsoft Excel (formula-formula untuk analisis data).
  5. Memahami proses billing, inventory management, dan administrasi warehouse.
  6. Memiliki kemampuan leadership, analisis, problem solving, dan komunikasi yang baik.
  7. Teliti, berorientasi pada target, serta mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan dan deadline.

title: Dept Head of Business Development - MODA
raw_description:
1. Menentukan prioritas BD, target, dan strategi kemitraan yang selaras dengan tujuan perusahaan.
  2. Meninjau dan memvalidasi wawasan pasar, industri, dan pesaing untuk menjadi insights pemilihan peluang.
  3. Memberikan penilaian strategis mengenai model bisnis, struktur komersial, dan pendekatan pasar (peninjauan bisnis yang ada & peluang baru).
  4. Membangun dan memelihara hubungan dengan mitra eksternal utama, klien, dan pemangku kepentingan strategis.
  5. Memimpin keterlibatan tingkat eksekutif, negosiasi, dan diskusi kemitraan.
  6. Mewakili perusahaan dalam dialog strategis untuk memperkuat kolaborasi jangka panjang.
  7. Mengarahkan dan mengawasi semua proses BD untuk memastikan keselarasan, efisiensi, dan kualitas.
  8. Meninjau hasil uji tuntas, evaluasi mitra, dan analisis kelayakan keuangan/bisnis sebelum diserahkan kepada manajemen.
  9. Memberikan panduan mengenai strategi negosiasi, struktur kesepakatan, dan mitigasi risiko.
  10. Memastikan penyelesaian proyek BD tepat waktu dan kepatuhan terhadap persyaratan internal.
  11. Berkoordinasi dengan fungsi terkait untuk memastikan keselarasan dalam inisiatif BD.
  12. Menggabungkan masukan lintas fungsi dan menyampaikan rekomendasi kepada manajemen.
raw_requirements:
1. Minimal gelar Sarjana (S1) di bidang Keuangan, Ekonomi, Teknik, atau bidang terkait lainnya.
  2. Minimal 8 tahun pengalaman kerja, lebih disukai di bidang pengembangan bisnis, kemitraan strategis, atau strategi perusahaan.
  3. Sertifikasi CFA merupakan nilai tambah.
  4. Kemampuan yang kuat dalam pemodelan keuangan, penilaian, dan analisis data.
  5. Kemampuan negosiasi dan presentasi yang sangat baik hingga tingkat eksekutif.

title: Executive Secretary Staff - FTI
raw_description:

  • Mengoordinasikan rapat internal dan eksternal, termasuk penjadwalan, persiapan, dan kebutuhan logistik.
